name: Friends of the Earth
subject: LAST CHANCE: Pesticides vs. Pollinators -- Earth Day Match expiring in 15 minutes
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736546?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736547?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736548?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736549?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $180,000 Earth Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TONIGHT.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736550?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce and even kill bees on contact. But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal before midnight TONIGHT! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736546?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736547?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736548?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736549?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on organic farms, these insects and others aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees,**we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of _**heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer, according to a recent study.**_
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736546?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736547?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736548?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736549?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you. **
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal before the clock strikes midnight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736546?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736547?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736548?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1736549?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **

name: Mike S. - Digital Team
subject: Who's going to clean this up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
Division has to end...| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=808d29790d084446b84edc66d5e12652&_e=G1vL43Zfonrn-ehXJP7UoFT3kz7qgeOxIFFs1hEk-C6qbNyhRAqf0HBiZ3l9oZFU8D9xzLPEpquaN3Jo_cJA1vwwqwavnxjuE24j-q_3tIYB_NqnHewARDx-9bXgRjNAm1YLkW1yb9h14OuFg1-JjMv3BWtUn7K6STqUHcsZCUYmo_DdOzjkEIZCBxRLzl70MnOSpl67GrtivY9GQ95W4xDhxEnd7NbwzOj9dCQ8IaIk8o-KPzdfAFAqabOax6C_Tpe1rfEOEXjW7HWcDaxcTA%3D%3D)
---
Someone's gotta clean this up, my friend. The extremes of Washington, D.C. have made a real mess of our country with toxic partisan politics that aim to divide when we should be working together. Families of middle America don't care about culture wars or what primetime sound bite was said over the airwaves. They care about safety, inflation, and raising their children. **An America United** continues to stand with leaders like Governor Larry Hogan who have repeatedly spoken out against the poisonous political divide.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=808d29790d084446b84edc66d5e12652&_e=G1vL43Zfonrn-ehXJP7UoFT3kz7qgeOxIFFs1hEk-C6qbNyhRAqf0HBiZ3l9oZFU8D9xzLPEpquaN3Jo_cJA1vwwqwavnxjuE24j-q_3tIYB_NqnHewARDx-9bXgRjNAc4CvbuI4fOGyjJjZkHlhLkReSEHpac8RLRwV7YghrHZTf9tdKQwdg495Nu8hUYiwgvQxbbOnfiC4PHyM7_tl2v33DxYm7UQlem1rRdnwBNiFeXIColuZuh8_j87_YptpiiFxsukmJE_KkjqxN27FMw%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=808d29790d084446b84edc66d5e12652&_e=G1vL43Zfonrn-ehXJP7UoFT3kz7qgeOxIFFs1hEk-C6qbNyhRAqf0HBiZ3l9oZFU8D9xzLPEpquaN3Jo_cJA1vwwqwavnxjuE24j-q_3tIYB_NqnHewARDx-9bXgRjNAMu1X3pNVsTyoavUducX2I8L_dwGytfcin6meHFYMqxT-GQ5FaVGknJqUMrWBlQDwDyixEqFEz4FL1x9-wK3uR5RV5MORZVdFQkC6ctFpGNz9yVUvkVCJY77wXKAs7C34XZ40Q50ESr-ty97znINZqQ%3D%3D)
---
Like the governor, we believe America has too many partisan politicians who are shouting over each other to get the next viral clip. This isn't helping. clean_body: Division has to end...| | | Someone's gotta clean this up, my friend. The extremes of Washington, D.C. have made a real mess of our country with toxic partisan politics that aim to divide when we should be working together. Families of middle America don't care about culture wars or what primetime sound bite was said over the airwaves. They care about safety, inflation, and raising their children. An America United continues to stand with leaders like Governor Larry Hogan who have repeatedly spoken out against the poisonous political divide. Like the governor, we believe America has too many partisan politicians who are shouting over each other to get the next viral clip. This isn't helping. These national voices should be used to advocate for a better path forward, not to attack one another. We need your help to combat the divisive noise. | | Thank you for sticking with us, Mike S. Team, Today is Earth Day, a time to appreciate the great outdoors and recommit ourselves to preserving our environment and the clean air and water that we can often take for granted. Gabe prides himself on being an outdoorsman and conservation champion. Before he was elected to Congress, he advocated for the preservation of our public lands and helped young people access and enjoy our time-honored traditions in the outdoors like fishing, camping, hunting, and more. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62182790/402597005/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230422earthday_tv_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI2OTViYS03M2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sL8HJTavn4eQD8uEtIu2dn612x7dHgL_XZ5Q6fkQfU4=)

**Now, he’s keeping up the fight for our environment in Congress by taking action on climate change, pushing back against Big Oil and Gas CEOs, proposing greater protections for the Gila River, and making sure New Mexico is resilient in the face of water shortages.**

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs7rnau9jj26cru84jma78o3hjr7upetkdeu4k78_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, Iâm thrilled at whatâs coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zso74g39ciaggbn24bfsakt1u5jlq0l2945cj7o8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06m2q0i38atg6itblj613lg5oe61klc1l086adg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, itâs going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqmgaoeqr1cg0c52sm6u0pg65d6mcif7oum1g6jo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg839ethng1asg6gdbaqjpdsa7j53649q4ke4r5g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeak1mb352b6us4tlge0b79og4bglp7d44bhurq8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zutclnupd9r6g3l0mvhuv32ebdkop3h9l4lnfpd0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bdlbmtiqqmif18kvuan0577p0528j8sbd59ij0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zst494bebphqlbb3k8dp0jpn5dr8te0fat6h7ktg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8eciq2c5nrs2sjisviv7vsgtbdc1rbgkdemfvj8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5q9uq4m9ifood3napvhtr6k0u4i2vt4mjtdbg30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf8aq88cpbfohcg0mugfs4i3u7uv6dmt8fiu3u9g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0bprdk1m09otbdk8fvqh8o9rts2t6kpe109jj0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg92k94vqp0q8v23tioq8h7g28sfucqli6k44cmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgj838t9vj22q21moo42au9liipenijqssugdiro_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbqr9j63ll58jg7a65one6d9ina37a6tn9uv49g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cth2bs)

---

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhjp47o8huejr9dvqp81d643j22hr8ecglib2o90_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o37c5h2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqv87jhsok4ebtpadqtsnkmd7mn8iscm7ne81nlo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o37c5h2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq5vpaim59ul5va1mm1vs8mbjci9pr1riillmlu0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cdh2bs)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbr4s742luldqssuk61kc7t8cvf1j4jiq6aqbc4g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cdh2bs).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi9dchoumlgt7skpll4e9frdfqc80rklqe8akduo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o35cdh2bs)

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbma8gpmc97f8kdof5hhhsk1ikjesuj6bg355upo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7jpdnh9b5upk0dff3el3br8rpemp8ofkdqqlkr8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5qgeh9l18jjjp2msmtm2cq0q19qcpmmse3u62pg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlllilkitebgf5hhpjpp1vmkv4fd20a1j2499eo8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj55th1k4lm0d6abq8ma03i30ob17156v9kedh30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zet3adovscahv69u4mlaeu1oc6lof0udkb5gk6qo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf1qdfp6gorm2bn257jhfvlmla14mbshut5c2o1g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm2o31cth2bs)
---|---|---

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

Please don't let our Party down, friend. We're counting on you.

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17490%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QcY1lMdxqF8%2fHCi5Uk2qEg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17491%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UETkrTX0zMAnHkz9qPxcGA&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17491%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UETkrTX0zMAnHkz9qPxcGA&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it’s not just about a few hundred banks. It’s about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665099%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Rg7jAoQ%2f46giXJUoH53vw&sysid=1). subject: Answers to life’s persistent questions
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWwXZfiDaN

Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy" course is now available
on DVD.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWwXZfiDaN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy"
course is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy
today.

Aristotle wrote: "All men by nature desire to
know."

The pursuit of knowledge about the most
important things has been the central activity of Hillsdale
College for over 179 years.

In contrast, most American colleges and
universities have embraced the "postmodern" idea that knowledge,
like truth, is relative-that there are no real answers to
questions like "What is the best kind of life?" and "What is the
right way to act?"

In 1931, Winston Churchill wrote an essay
where he imagined a future where mankind had secured a life of
great pleasure, wealth, and convenience. But, Churchill wondered,
would that be sufficient for happiness?

What did they know more than we know about
the answers to the simple questions which man has asked since the
earliest dawn of reason-'Why are we here? What is the purpose of
life? Whither are we going?'

No material progress, even though it takes
shapes we cannot now conceive, or however it may expand the
faculties of man, can bring comfort to his soul.

Hillsdale's free online course, "Introduction
to Western Philosophy," examines just such questions as Churchill
poses.

This course pursues answers to these
questions by studying the arguments of great Western philosophers
such as Plato, Aristotle, Thomas Aquinas, Immanuel Kant, and C.S.
Lewis.

And this 14-lecture course is now available
in a special DVD box set perfect for viewing in your home or a
small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool
curriculum or personal study.

The "Introduction to Western Philosophy" DVD
box-set can be yours with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more
to Hillsdale College. Reserve your copy today using this secure
link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61725812:WwXZfiDaN:m:3:2532013465:D5C9F968766199F3008114E80D541821:r

Hillsdale produces and promotes free online
courses, as we do all of our work while refusing to accept
government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or
state student grants or loans.

With your tax-deductible gift today, we can
enroll thousands of Americans in "Introduction to Western
Philosophy" and other online courses on topics such as the
Constitution and American history.

Please help promote Hillsdale's free online
courses such as "Introduction to Western Philosophy" and other
educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America
with a tax-deductible gift.

And remember, when you give a gift of $100 or
more today, we'll send you a special DVD box set of "Introduction

clean_body: Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy" course is now available on DVD. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Fellow American, Our "Introduction to Western Philosophy" course is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy today. Aristotle wrote: "All men by nature desire to know." The pursuit of knowledge about the most important things has been the central activity of Hillsdale College for over 179 years. In contrast, most American colleges and universities have embraced the "postmodern" idea that knowledge, like truth, is relative-that there are no real answers to questions like "What is the best kind of life?" and "What is the right way to act?" In 1931, Winston Churchill wrote an essay where he imagined a future where mankind had secured a life of great pleasure, wealth, and convenience. But, Churchill wondered, would that be sufficient for happiness? What did they know more than we know about the answers to the simple questions which man has asked since the earliest dawn of reason-'Why are we here? What is the purpose of life? Whither are we going?' No material progress, even though it takes shapes we cannot now conceive, or however it may expand the faculties of man, can bring comfort to his soul. Hillsdale's free online course, "Introduction to Western Philosophy," examines just such questions as Churchill poses. This course pursues answers to these questions by studying the arguments of great Western philosophers such as Plato, Aristotle, Thomas Aquinas, Immanuel Kant, and C.S. Lewis. And this 14-lecture course is now available in a special DVD box set perfect for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. The "Introduction to Western Philosophy" DVD box-set can be yours with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Reserve your copy today using this secure link: Hillsdale produces and promotes free online courses, as we do all of our work while refusing to accept government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll thousands of Americans in "Introduction to Western Philosophy" and other online courses on topics such as the Constitution and American history. Please help promote Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Introduction to Western Philosophy" and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for America with a tax-deductible gift. And remember, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a special DVD box set of "Introduction to Western Philosophy" as our thank-you. Quantities are limited, though, and you won't find this DVD anywhere else but from Hillsdale. You can make your tax-deductible gift in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts and receive your DVD box set using this secure link: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
It is official! I’ve just launched my campaign for Governor

| |
---
| | |
Patriot,

**It is official! I 've just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. **

I'm not afraid to say that I'm a proud Christian, and America First conservative.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2cnbof3qpbndl39l7sjp9m7jvfnq6oqk380m59o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2c9h2bs)
---

And if you didn't already notice, I'm a black American.

Joe Biden, the Democrats, and the liberal media will tell you that as a black American, I can't be any of those things.

They think folks like me can't think for ourselves. They think we should just fall in line and do as we are told.

And now they want me to just sit down and shut up, and they'll do anything to destroy me for being a free-thinking man that undermines their sacred narrative.

It won't be long until they're running wall-to-wall coverage saying our silent majority is dead. Now, I'm ready for what they're going to hit me with- but that doesn't make fighting back any easier.

**So I 'm humbly asking you to take just a few seconds today and endorse my campaign right out of the gates.**** **

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zau71agh0vl8nlu2edbc7nipegvpe6quj4qruv3g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2c9h2bs)

---
Let's show Biden and the liberal media that our movement is strong, and our movement is serious.

Thank you & God Bless.

Mark Robinson
GOP Candidate for Governor

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
Do you want to know something important I’ve learned?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6eebq4qs4f6ndlq4j04qmouahdq8hbrudjh708_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrq0unmdnpad118g9g0813oi5taium7v2ppjl3g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z25tob3dhuddr52grh4e4flfrppegpvibocic2u8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcgsr6bvf5kfig1rmjh266gjp1v8gerktc2n312o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuo3i6m5k6r6eg1g6450c19og8mj21j801h51kqg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zddsqovilts893s88cce5kujp3m9v01gvms2qt00_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrjuhk3n8r85dqmg3j2fcdidiklvl7u21imon958_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrmg1jlpudmhl2b44fspeatqdr1gqr5v9cu2s3ig_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvk6ea1gek1us500v2cuoidbk1ga8vv85m07qsdo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6prqhck6nl5533suhkqo4gufpdi3itjrrgd1lug_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8q4eternhbc9uv6f4584cvkefkrjfbtphj3lab0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqfddk2jcfbkb0rci5np3uifi2trmhetvsrtl3so_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zadnt0jsfvv1sb0idtq132odan5c7upceiglf73o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gmeor2cdh2bs)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

GOP Presidential
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17408%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2W9sfcZ%2biiBrUkUAef1TXw&sysid=1)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17409%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nnWWUIlrYUT5FHiVh46pNg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17408%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2W9sfcZ%2biiBrUkUAef1TXw&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17400%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m9ThQNvlkW8E4Jsi5GH1Ow&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. | Fellow American - Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival. Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America. Time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology. 1. Shut down + replace the FBI 2. Shut down + replace the IRS 3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process 4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims 5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few. Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
It's Gary Sinise here.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5pl5iemur6ka7b9vorpcm4fgludsms3ulaobmv0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zonf9g5b5t4p9assei9g4hickbv2ied9re2bmuvg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrdbmr54t8icdl9r33lmculaekr3nulavc5qk1so_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn0am9fghhh82u5it1mmdbo9sv1bih0vl99v11v8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zahtld633jenn8snfji7m8kc99jdtsn5j5vujjh8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr95rm80ri73718phcpeuk5sadk0h3eihs4c1u60_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6j2npc1haeaqd3qtjte12nl2unqv25nmpb1emu8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztog0llqsom476bq4dhufgkjuj4n8oaf616k9tn8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zes5pd7r47vqcmtpbe4h5us95k2n974mkphapro0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl0a58pikv5r6didjsaaefk6qutv9n45pe8hkn1g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjprjf9f5m02apvrj0ofdmr5g1v6ci8mcv312na0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshg69o30c1im48d245p25oh4cdge4oj1cjgm4p724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn2ampovvjal2cgrbqpje9thoii07e66k8ahvfj0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7scpdtgodrbb1p4csd1en6hs0eqg8vaaqqkdm9g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob2cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665005%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=anaVlOTHHpuM%2flmBIPBVqA&sysid=1 "But with that in the
rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665006%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R6bZXdNfNPt9zfwLeJXrfg&sysid=1 "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665007%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oTWEdkeou8y%2fkkSnROYeJg&sysid=1 "Look – if we want to
win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665008%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KWPyPWl%2bD3t2PEvf4s5ODw&sysid=1 "From the bottom of my
heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54?
If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665009%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vF62Rjx81Y9qGtDBiCUg%2fQ&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665000%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3TY40vfYAlmaVZs51HlG1w&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NZdyMHPG28m4DGyYEGxJbQ&sysid=1)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

---

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo8ar39bk3216cbid8jcampkm5fgr54k6ls14dr0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zosnafacd3v7ffptu0meqla7rsre5g9jjng8md80_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu554dlm6hjpgec5rg4m76bvgft4f3tr0ea480io_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6c5h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl7to4jf63ptpcum3hd6ejgn3pfor49l8tqo9ub8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60p70c1g66oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsfsf0vi4vshg29ca79g1phm6n39l167vs3c56o0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6c5h2bs)_

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ie66uk2hen2dnu1irspu4fkj5kli7s2gb22s70_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z19fn1lsn69d6jt14oc258blcopsrh9d6mvrll48_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7mnggpaiv7oa3798q670bn6sldl7lhv6j0ugq20_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq87q00sltjqutksqtr5lkkqi30le62h7fi89cu8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqg0ejnujobumvh1qtgsrm5v87530fkgf364d6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zinq4fj6l3khaqaeu595iss6ksf6110hj392e4u0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hhsotj4bhvbh6utgvh37r00nptk77eqt5gkf50_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9gm9ob6clh2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79925%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UhToG6VScPHltJS2%2f%2fsEIg&sysid=1)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79926%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aZNZzzYu3RpHRLzCJEF%2bFQ&sysid=1).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79927%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ur3zq8NKCeTAzRZIyW5K0g&sysid=1)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ld75t1lpn9t6fn7nsafr7se0oiqmqfdams9dv0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9im8oj1c9h2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4q3npmt7h68o3tpiisii62gu2uirril8bp05mg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9im8oj1c9h2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

---
