name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.
body:
key 2024 House district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f79beb7-1e6e-4772-8640-720df486495c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Hi! Cliff here, and we have a special guest who'd like to speak with you! A_ _s they say in the business Al used to be in, Senator Franken, take it away!......._ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49b3ef7e-b9a6-413e-adee-2e720c584df5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e799a6f-cbf0-446a-91d7-bc3b19cdbd1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e6351e1-a4c2-4202-afac-8c8770f5ab05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64cac3b8-a428-4040-a61b-f55f86a621b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7728cf14-524c-4ef8-ac62-7595dc9d1cef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17101410-9040-4016-b8c4-0550909bf29b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I’ve said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z61l2ihngi56t9frobtg3dqig8g6f9kfjfi4jfmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zchvoufn5kn43ods6olqumvg884543pc3s0ejas8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9h289sdu9e17nqji00tgdooorpvbouup6villno_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbdvdno8o29tum8thlmqaq84l4pe1ap3oqrkrkmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0qbos004i66js45191nfs7pe99rgqm9or473qpg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2gtvq7bu1qknra4pu3rbko7tevgcgl5h8btkico_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zenvk5t1m1vdobj2auriq5k4oo176f0pv8qfj6ag_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zggub12ib82vlbjubms1ucfiaep7bgt1di120lq0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7p4citr50i4uuejcitheatk117nnl148r46duoo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zflm6nvnjnra0rnjp05vb7oijsi18m7gpetts0dg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znbq9n6rbiogeqoom23tqpik5i70qjhuv0kbjbvo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsnssepobu6g7maqra34qrl1l5g5mvb9vbj2k33g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9imco36c1h2bs)

It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zif20qmv10qa29m3ga2l4ggnaafosld02ktvc4d8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9im2o71clh2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm0een2ghav1sp1ospn1a7vks0qjrqpnfh7f5ne8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c9im2o71clh2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

| | A standout quote: "The hospital is designed for maximum profit. There's nothing to ensure safety." Dr. Bob Lorinser, a resident of Marquette, a medical colleague of UPHS staff, and a previous hospitalist and patient at UPHS, said he is very worried. "I worked at UPHS from 1989 until 2011 when I left to be a Diplomat and physician to serve the nation overseas," said Lorinser. "This is where my family receives care and where several friends are hospitalized.
"Marquette is my community, and UPHS is our hospital. I am dismayed and saddened to hear of these alleged internal struggles for staff and patients." Following the publication of the exposé, Lorinser sent a letter to fellow physicians offering support.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/79OUjRQId/c?w=0HSvBb_nKW3G5X-20IHzUa5AAHt9YoVae-TAhzifIj4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5hYm91dHRvd24uc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3Avc29zLWluLXRoZS1lciIsInIiOiI3YmY3OGE5OC1mOWU1LTRlODAtOTRmNy03MDk5MmUyZmVmZTIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)
---
| | "I stand in solidarity with doctors and nurses who are committed to quality community care.' - Bob Lorinser
"Many hospitals are facing problems for a multitude of reasons, but none of them should be to favor stockholders," said Lorinser. "When healthcare isn't the first priority, patients suffer. Profit can be used for good in most industries. However, the for-profit model in medical care often sacrifices patients' well-being.
"With over 25% of community hospitals are now for-profit, I worry. "Healthcare is a human right. We are failing Americans, but there is a better way. We must create a publicly financed, non-profit national health insurance program that fully covers all Americans' medical costs. Our for-profit system is not working." "The healthcare system is broken, and we desperately need reform. It's why I am running for Congress and why we need a Doctor in the House." Lorinser says patients come first, always. "Hospitals must put people before profit and invest in the community, or leave."
---

clean_body: Dr. Bob Lorinser issues statement about concerns at UPHS | To summarize the newsletter, doctors in the emergency department claim UPHS strug | | Can't see this message? | | | | | 'Man About Town,' a local Marquette-based newsletter, published an exposé "" by retired journalist Brian Cabell. The piece anonymously interviews five physicians at UP Health System - Marquette (UPHS), which revealed significant problems with the direction of the for-profit hospital. | | Dr. Bob Lorinser issues statement about concerns at UPHS | | | | To summarize the newsletter, doctors in the emergency department claim UPHS struggles with doctor and nurse turnover, outsourcing registration, elderly and pediatric care, unprecedented wait times, and an unresponsive hospital administration. for healthcare reform. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A standout quote: "The hospital is designed for maximum profit. There's nothing to ensure safety." Dr. Bob Lorinser, a resident of Marquette, a medical colleague of UPHS staff, and a previous hospitalist and patient at UPHS, said he is very worried. "I worked at UPHS from 1989 until 2011 when I left to be a Diplomat and physician to serve the nation overseas," said Lorinser. "This is where my family receives care and where several friends are hospitalized. "Marquette is my community, and UPHS is our hospital. I am dismayed and saddened to hear of these alleged internal struggles for staff and patients." Following the publication of the exposé, Lorinser sent a letter to fellow physicians offering support. | | | | "I stand in solidarity with doctors and nurses who are committed to quality community care.' - Bob Lorinser "Many hospitals are facing problems for a multitude of reasons, but none of them should be to favor stockholders," said Lorinser. "When healthcare isn't the first priority, patients suffer. Profit can be used for good in most industries. However, the for-profit model in medical care often sacrifices patients' well-being. "With over 25% of community hospitals are now for-profit, I worry. "Healthcare is a human right. We are failing Americans, but there is a better way. We must create a publicly financed, non-profit national health insurance program that fully covers all Americans' medical costs. Our for-profit system is not working." "The healthcare system is broken, and we desperately need reform. It's why I am running for Congress and why we need a Doctor in the House." Lorinser says patients come first, always. "Hospitals must put people before profit and invest in the community, or leave." | | you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | You've been e-mailed this content because of information you've supplied through previous contributions to our cause. name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
It gets worse:When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the hundredthof a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b12e7e03e7c426f815daa0fda2020cd&_e=Oirow_Op79EQCOMBOfMzghBGtpS-kTMh_RwqQEAFMxhJ9ZPw2P1NVBjrtK-Cj3TDOloi5pHyMTfRPITVwy9TUQiI10oLQ2essV4JLfmsxLGiaEfZ2hsFabqCFE5DHKRcFomMYJTOE29cl7_MB9DSw-JcoSVwDAOPS3TyxQCLPSqqjeAZOXn7DYtgD4HtwKudJpaGiXlBXKOICpDStTtANOR_mhDJrPnJCZBkby3p58YAi4DWW_n3LsavwxrN9WudYfpOkcnL0oVqBZH2Tfl4JcxYnDyaHYYrGWsanPgs5EE--I6KnquoKDToMYfLQVmkMPmzymtyCQFQTYkeWanDo-4CUuBPtKUydUY_31Ay_EKIG1H0H-rW6HQYVgQDQdArQ6FK_6bSxJL-rjRZkYZ7bkyJG7QRlUzgUNQgPGfBC0ml7uOpgzOio8IknHNRk5lVuhqTRPTT6PGRp50a9i4cmw%3D%3D)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b12e7e03e7c426f815daa0fda2020cd&_e=Oirow_Op79EQCOMBOfMzghBGtpS-kTMh_RwqQEAFMxhJ9ZPw2P1NVBjrtK-Cj3TDOloi5pHyMTfRPITVwy9TUQiI10oLQ2essV4JLfmsxLGiaEfZ2hsFabqCFE5DHKRcFomMYJTOE29cl7_MB9DSw-JcoSVwDAOPS3TyxQCLPSqqjeAZOXn7DYtgD4HtwKudJpaGiXlBXKOICpDStTtANOR_mhDJrPnJCZBkby3p58YAi4DWW_n3LsavwxrN9WudYfpOkcnL0oVqBZH2Tfl4JcxYnDyaHYYrGWsanPgs5EE--I6KnquoKDToMYfLQVmkWeJ3FOgRvLt0g_J_yfOsb6dn3JhCI78DQs-Me20Vaar6FPuIm_Jx8OPASzUSkZdwSj4nNevA0eKEHEIXc7ibp9ijvQ2ye3jTkrtzqCmsri_lWgzlrq4hBRjNF7uq34bONjBJAn4RxfsreO-qCvKkEw%3D%3D "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT8rbZqsJxZ78RFjzFfY-o0XRhMXKuaiTQ-NlAywev1XvrkVYPS_X3r_dOH-MyP16RCwwbkD6pemXA3fUsAOrJSyicoWZccXTj_927BM-Bxif6-9pT-xDxyLMbkk5knM2l-KTZxZ8LVS_DpkUXA5h-ZM)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT_tdYxpu2J0MK2F6SBHFdBnyNkpNXIsCCsfwiZfkW4WLaEGY3GtMonTrjKlD6TR5UsLoOR6DNKA8oP9eqReY6ZomGRVJQfj6SNx9WzWT5tRd-kiY_dDYYQebsUZiMz_XvkF8biNtR7CvIEdT64Juyta)

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT8UNLGjKA3gGTXhd2DAQzPymtww5OpOYAIDJB7Ra-yUX7CV-gGFoj-AQ_Qa4FlqxJ01SClEbpTOt4pzNP86mrP6qzxoLV2mdYp0kpnaUMyM56NlMPoSoUULnGf4GWNir4Vfa6l3F6Qsrvufj2dRTtvb)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT96waFjBMWElxD7WIbma1oRU2pSCaxd5IKmx9eIec1gdRQ8aVjz158GhsHssL0nvhTOovLQ4M-5BX_m5n654iUBltoDGxIQkmvWeA9VQdT7QogAgvznoc9897EnbXu6HGoa1GWbyp3NTjetF_fNe96M)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT8KmIan47h_fE276s8piOj4SEq-VbygrW_IMoCmO3Q_NG5-RtBjx5XTl1-RMkanyiHc_-2ZeiaBRbrFKx6LxFxYRR4HufzcEzJlXzNi912QNXkZOCUgLisuYG2ickE6PCfZOxq2qMAmvz6z3MORqiM6)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT-sXLwcwMP0pzFr2JIgy2fI5B0RNlwFMXZohYT3gXHX1s-t6D2We5wm7ospu_bI8bQyubFKZl1wgsROJpZ4DWOSyt9Dqq9gJ2BxvVocBP1mFBUicIBbm8jf6Rxq6cMd93Paf-M-6NoThx-B0l89I5Tb) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c300a71605e4027a15060095c4425a9&_e=wzoQcJ_4sgjQxAoPHnu-KWF0ke9u5CGVGOKJUlM5KIWWw0Kxm_-qpTmwn1QT9cUlX6-ERnDexFfJuWZBuPdvwmcBi4lnA3DAx2m5Mf8jYPeyGCu48pi01FnD_jJeAjEHUGQs_JNqVT58RnsybDmn0cx01MVrJKN5E91Gk5ARRT_8-eGlNwT4a1-rU6zbKhprmd68l4irM8lsaoNucDhCUXx4rauLaTp1KKEsgqh0jiT2Up22dUiapSqECcFXB-sBsh8DpAK3yWvvdArjkkG8hcoFzH7YW_ZrIAq4CYTGcZAu2FsuB7X0E0Kon1a742od)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b842fc41a514f6d9015755457b79a3b&_e=IjoVPD2DXSW1F4H1lmLZdrnjETt5OhnYS9CbS-FhLAGwQwAFdX2nKkNle4Zr3uN4jNNncecMAfvT0a8B9iSblP4Yb07LZLZ0Rf7m5RZ68BrmAHls3S-DHhM1jOG7pZRNEkG058dubztD9ubRVs32_JCkJoHfzATEVQvD3HVkvBqFzAnMG93_ziHk0nPAgRTqa7BT-EgYUv7fUbCaMfzYLbietDRLxIwH5fIk2yPfWN20-3Rt-70Rj6PYfPnTtNMcPvWwouoWUtSmB9jV9XIu6g%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b842fc41a514f6d9015755457b79a3b&_e=IjoVPD2DXSW1F4H1lmLZdrnjETt5OhnYS9CbS-FhLAGwQwAFdX2nKkNle4Zr3uN4jNNncecMAfvT0a8B9iSblP4Yb07LZLZ0Rf7m5RZ68BrmAHls3S-DHhM1jOG7pZRNk-7RCf0iWwjgmujwb5x2qGnc4DBK2_JubkA3VjTyzYiaWo5J4TDfHxeNuWjtgzZ6hihp5xe1gEtv0yWALl7H6wU0jpyY6B13GZpec0yk_kMr_HNAWp-3x1SOjNwIslFLkK9-VvnkZFjoqfa5JXn7LA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b842fc41a514f6d9015755457b79a3b&_e=IjoVPD2DXSW1F4H1lmLZdrnjETt5OhnYS9CbS-FhLAGwQwAFdX2nKkNle4Zr3uN4jNNncecMAfvT0a8B9iSblP4Yb07LZLZ0Rf7m5RZ68BrmAHls3S-DHhM1jOG7pZRNtTl7p1DsNZN3Uw4ZZO4CNKM_agSnUnDhhDSVWr3XVSxn8xW1rcbgyw8_uvlLG6_VLyu4j7yerPcdRjNVdzN_Np2k5X4pbGGE-4C2gZCx1tEyJCNgE0jkf-GDOh8y9VWYjdfg2Aifzo1WtxSPeT1h_Q%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b842fc41a514f6d9015755457b79a3b&_e=IjoVPD2DXSW1F4H1lmLZdrnjETt5OhnYS9CbS-FhLAGwQwAFdX2nKkNle4Zr3uN4jNNncecMAfvT0a8B9iSblP4Yb07LZLZ0Rf7m5RZ68BrmAHls3S-DHhM1jOG7pZRNExjtDr9ebHysw3e0w3LzjnukMDqlX2iPHtsg8m_eJy4zmTRi-Lq8kwQscquQG6qD-eFHoSXl8AhIjXyYjtzsulTo4kW6wbIFFLAOd7FO8vz4q-PnPqx_2gpkPzW35AmJt729M0-CWoGD7JlVvtQ2ug%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18937?t=1001&akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18910?t=1002&akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix ]?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18937?t=1003&akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix ]CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18937?t=1004&akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230423-3167-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3167_346206_umYcix&akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3167%2E346206%2EumYcix

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Miyares
subject: Miyares Weekly Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c86afb55427b05395556c4122b1c1e10cc1a18dad06ed7e25b21fbf79a9f6f802ced493c1cec26ca7d106aa1cf63380af05)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c863afcf850c5f6fa0c5b9b2f7367dfe7096a285ea188317402bd2946458e83c609d53d328a12196806e754defebd1d508f)
---
**Attorney General Jason Miyares led a bipartisan coalition of 33 state attorneys general and the District of Columbia in asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear the case of James Rudisill and protect veterans ' rights. ** **After his first tour, Virginia resident and decorated veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan, Mr. Rudisill, used his Montgomery GI Bill benefits to further his education, successfully complete his undergraduate degree, and return to the U.S. Army as a commissioned officer. Mr. Rudisill 's bravery and service was highlighted when he received one of the military's highest accolades - the Bronze Star. Following his third tour, he was accepted into the Yale Divinity School, with a goal of returning to the armed forces yet again, this time as a chaplain. ** **However, Mr. Rudisill, is being denied his Post 9/11 GI Bill benefits by the Department of Veterans Affairs. Although this unexplainable decision by the Department of Veterans Affairs was overturned by multiple courts, the en banc U.S Court of Appeal for the Federal Circuit ultimately upheld the decision - **_**_robbing thousands of veterans of the GI benefits they earned while SERVING THEIR COUNTRY_**_** __._ _** _" Veterans like James Rudisill represent the very best of America and of Virginia. But rather than support his desire to find new ways to lay his life on the line and serve his country, the Federal Circuit took away both James Rudisill and thousands of other post 9/11 veterans' GI education benefits. Over 700,000 veterans live in the Commonwealth of Virginia. This decision actively hurts veterans' reentry into civilian life and deprives them of earned benefits." _ **- Attorney General Miyares**
---
| | [Click Here to Learn More](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c863f0ef87fd09d7767da399371fcfff030ddab723b3df509d92487afd28fe84c97276c8aefccac407b65431f0593e7adca)
---
|

| | [To Read the Brief in Full, Click Here](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c86040cb75f540654daf940b4fb89262fb33b0c037892f44b72ae7b7faa6e4fce542a914e1af61c82dd74935b3aa05a58a5)
---
|
---
**SAKI Roundtable** **_April is Sexual Assault Awareness Month_**
---
|
---
| **Attorney General Miyares hosted a roundtable with his office 's Sexual Assault Kit Initiative (SAKI) Victim Advocates and other supporters from throughout Virginia to discuss what steps additional steps can be taken to support survivors and prevent sexual violence. **
---
|
---
**_Thanks to all participants for sharing your valuable insight!_**
---
**Holding Bad Actors Accountable **
---
**1st Adult & Pediatrics Healthcare, headquartered in Fairfax, has agreed to pay $3,000,000 to resolve allegations that it violated the False Claims Act by engaging in fraudulent billing activities between January 2017 and May 2021 with regards to pediatric in-home health, personal care, and related services. ** **This organization routinely billed Virginia Medicaid for home health services that were not actually provided and billed Virginia Medicaid for reimbursements for in-home health services for pediatric patients who, in reality, were hospitalized during the same time period the in-home services were billed. ** _" Those who take advantage of Virginians during some of their most vulnerable times must be held accountable. Thanks to the excellent work done by my office and our federal partners, this organization will have to answer for its illegitimate billing methods that exploited hospitalized pediatric patients." _ **- Attorney General Miyares **
---
| | [Click Here to Learn More](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c863b4ea3b8d6fbdc457eed04c31f1b6152fb1ac4e3c6d06ac46038fd95118c9fd8608c7eb3a8e72d8a15fd238fc89e2739)
---
|
---
**Virginia 's Drug Courts**

**AG Miyares got to speak with and congratulate the Montgomery County graduates last week.**
---
| [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=747a94f1ff458c86579e2e7e2da377807396bbdab14461cf1caa53febef29dc3d66d7416206fb4dc30798cb7cbfb028dcd37b5c3d49ccb83)
---
| **The Commonwealth 's drug courts are an important resource that help reduce crime and recidivism by providing substance abusing offenders early intervention measures and extensive treatment options that might not be available otherwise. **** **
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Attorney General Jason Miyares led a bipartisan coalition of 33 state attorneys general and the District of Columbia in asking the Supreme Court of the United States to hear the case of James Rudisill and protect veterans ' rights. After his first tour, Virginia resident and decorated veteran of the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan, Mr. Rudisill, used his Montgomery GI Bill benefits to further his education, successfully complete his undergraduate degree, and return to the U.S. Army as a commissioned officer. Mr. Rudisill 's bravery and service was highlighted when he received one of the military's highest accolades - the Bronze Star. Following his third tour, he was accepted into the Yale Divinity School, with a goal of returning to the armed forces yet again, this time as a chaplain. However, Mr. Rudisill, is being denied his Post 9/11 GI Bill benefits by the Department of Veterans Affairs. Although this unexplainable decision by the Department of Veterans Affairs was overturned by multiple courts, the en banc U.S Court of Appeal for the Federal Circuit ultimately upheld the decision - robbing thousands of veterans of the GI benefits they earned while SERVING THEIR COUNTRY . " Veterans like James Rudisill represent the very best of America and of Virginia. But rather than support his desire to find new ways to lay his life on the line and serve his country, the Federal Circuit took away both James Rudisill and thousands of other post 9/11 veterans' GI education benefits. Over 700,000 veterans live in the Commonwealth of Virginia. This decision actively hurts veterans' reentry into civilian life and deprives them of earned benefits." - Attorney General Miyares | | | | | | SAKI Roundtable April is Sexual Assault Awareness Month | | Attorney General Miyares hosted a roundtable with his office 's Sexual Assault Kit Initiative (SAKI) Victim Advocates and other supporters from throughout Virginia to discuss what steps additional steps can be taken to support survivors and prevent sexual violence. | Thanks to all participants for sharing your valuable insight! Holding Bad Actors Accountable 1st Adult & Pediatrics Healthcare, headquartered in Fairfax, has agreed to pay $3,000,000 to resolve allegations that it violated the False Claims Act by engaging in fraudulent billing activities between January 2017 and May 2021 with regards to pediatric in-home health, personal care, and related services. This organization routinely billed Virginia Medicaid for home health services that were not actually provided and billed Virginia Medicaid for reimbursements for in-home health services for pediatric patients who, in reality, were hospitalized during the same time period the in-home services were billed. " Those who take advantage of Virginians during some of their most vulnerable times must be held accountable. Thanks to the excellent work done by my office and our federal partners, this organization will have to answer for its illegitimate billing methods that exploited hospitalized pediatric patients." - Attorney General Miyares | | | Virginia 's Drug Courts AG Miyares got to speak with and congratulate the Montgomery County graduates last week. | | The Commonwealth 's drug courts are an important resource that help reduce crime and recidivism by providing substance abusing offenders early intervention measures and extensive treatment options that might not be available otherwise. | | | | | | Until next time, Jason Miyares | | | | | "JasonMiyares.com" | | DONATE TODAY TO FUEL JASON'S FIGHT TO PROTECT THE COMMONWEALTH! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1da05be5b98b47ebb8bedf348f111b25&_e=zj8abduvAQbQt48c4AMNjBHMFeEM1zjZHdSNpzBh0qAhxgT563IxbbUt12GKrbeM_Jo1xiVovug7KPTqR_7bj-5yw7qgyNdMYAHdUEKSMhaRn823uogXv-Fv0qWL_iVmSOs6dFHjBLF5J_7-ECNjAJuHiesN3PK_5tWeLeymUJUk6Ri3tbe-KUOZYY52z3Y0PibhBmu87uY9VzWt-Nb98gpAPUmTw39bBwxqi1a_qhMJgewo-7qUVV7laUEkeol8BiLaD3U0VH5uqBBYOqT8sOqYm3zpdkX3JFfKWlmlBFztXXed2nvvjnZBfuCSyt8-tXXNwoHMkjwwfM1gDfKiQTBfGgJJlvuLpfEQ6-5BHQEUteVEKnFrc5ipzANImfM29gLEey50ec6zdFTS_3nsag%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1da05be5b98b47ebb8bedf348f111b25&_e=zj8abduvAQbQt48c4AMNjBHMFeEM1zjZHdSNpzBh0qAhxgT563IxbbUt12GKrbeM_Jo1xiVovug7KPTqR_7bj-5yw7qgyNdMYAHdUEKSMhaRn823uogXv-Fv0qWL_iVmSOs6dFHjBLF5J_7-ECNjAJuHiesN3PK_5tWeLeymUJUk6Ri3tbe-KUOZYY52z3Y0PibhBmu87uY9VzWt-Nb98gpAPUmTw39bBwxqi1a_qhMJgewo-7qUVV7laUEkeol854ItBz_acrcQtPa6Qr2lKtI6236Bt2I1T3Vma8vSeLpHHD3LUyWkSswYmA7aTnxdvkEQu-5vhR_xOe8bvpQPABwpPqUjhreeBp_Hqi_9vDOzZ3lmzcxVHBoixkFBIlfT981sEUjTIv-al13mjrxv3A%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1da05be5b98b47ebb8bedf348f111b25&_e=zj8abduvAQbQt48c4AMNjBHMFeEM1zjZHdSNpzBh0qAhxgT563IxbbUt12GKrbeM_Jo1xiVovug7KPTqR_7bj-5yw7qgyNdMYAHdUEKSMhaRn823uogXv-Fv0qWL_iVmSOs6dFHjBLF5J_7-ECNjAJuHiesN3PK_5tWeLeymUJUk6Ri3tbe-KUOZYY52z3Y0PibhBmu87uY9VzWt-Nb98gpAPUmTw39bBwxqi1a_qhMJgewo-7qUVV7laUEkeol8h7F7cVMkCezpzTCsb_fY5kTfiQVmOa7k3Vmy_4lVgHyR4hkZ4REjP_98o1lMfDvTs9WjAXMfHOBtKvWf4IuL9C7C9wJ0Kxs_nY5qEpMEp0aqqvqcC_VlFOlWkHT8-mMQ4ZHBO62t1bYNfSkKdUYI9g%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEkn68EFqic_V_97Fvu6Ksbg1q3k8jRglnr4pgITQzBk45FJ8i-eHZ56xYWSxZKz6lvBm_4iP_0sn8xMRtlWR0utdJPkpw18eMsZpFGWPT09WLtCyjxbOKZggm9uuEyNbxbDgjnndwsTTLkL3ncBYpQp)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEntd-_K_Vv4TNphQGcbPJ4nCuAhy3jBDbtQZpjXvtECig7wScdor-xFkBVWItqR9uOanlsrGHZRZn_JG5B409tryIDGYZ8VnpUfKywzsSDy7uQjcNLNhCheJuwaoFrr4ziNflhJf4Zg4fJ0uwhmkpSn)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEl4VYo0uo8M98BBanZ7jFkNerplfEUZYgwq9JKuJEbH4TG7ommiDu96X9tPVi4dt2S_AtPpyUCXOS6twp9DVhuA6DB_8fn6AIZHd3QGR1nCvaFXR0bGa4NnIZNLdWG-Jrj-zs4lB3U-srHkw2pv2myk)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEltlQ8g3QU_V52RZhfvBM-5kfzWwbZ0f64bxQlbFRssHz6v02T5skMuhHtf-UiWnn8yaHUSYI8EP7J0gXJD-MP09798rrpHxLo7mxYnoOb3s9XqN4rfWPDYtKcXdEF-fTX5u3F0KVkmmxv7TLAntcie)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEniZt5IdNdRRn2NGD8vxLp5sCfb3laAbdcjVACLKRrg4OxLTXv8-R976FLFjbCB6XOre6ibABdMT7Heg3J1UzpwcZZunYxm6prp96A28jSj6kCtv9z9bWmVhxYzXntkm4rRR0lowwhW_edpCVmxbSqB)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEmSNsWO6ZIhcgYxaaAn27tF6Ot5mQqe89zoP_EcTjT7kpDu1L74fbCvN5RXZih4xnl78KO8MVKebcqwjc2gOnpPEwCCZqKcil2C_joZKTpM8nHCWGt1c-ZbS3D1Kvb0E-C-vB4_1LgkVJQz7DhZmL5B)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEEmRmp_h-M5d6RUCPxftdU7T3KZZi2HSfX17iimUpuFZogJZviUjcumymw16kMupcsa5SB1QL8OaNW6kUIU9eFps8w2OF76UVajwubKJHKTQ8otTTmW7jQRUhnjO6EOGwNf78-BkuxpaxxRLiS7duGcW) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4829350efe3547b08b50b59b557dff72&_e=KlrMz5gt0E-C7y1_MTQIdmocFwZRM2OuYdZ7XAc5rbklNCsfHhGpbpo3X552UMb-dTFftqXp3xtskz737oFLBvaNx6iLzdXddCDV1isxAhnJEAQonCrQYb4wnODJ1XE3QZTXInxhvW9-PmsSNbmjxulb6pulXae3mjWuigJHEElPpciF6AKYL4xoRtxbhTa7WB7BGOpsFhT7iF3gnGPXA_M9iMnJZeRuPpMKuWZRXpmpcALdqje7-qtlD9_70tLxVe1SThasZjuTheibvaXjHcBTEozcvRIDu0t-pLnX1VRHaYbisGBSyyP8Yzx0mwaL)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Can I trust you with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b89f84788164754bb52b9ead3718021&_e=f3JN5IaCqx_4q6FogC87Zlp3BpRsZothZl3GrA2_pqcPu_7crbANeKKsclg4HTr2uNcfVDvXuUBSt0MY4tywQpafCIB1BVLIKD8R7w6PYeJqebeRBb-b3AScB4-OGH6yyFfU3gIOOG2aGdshm9dI7LHRO7ywA3DaEHjIQFGnVha9Y5EKhS0VJ_8ba96qTXy-0RZqj4-q90KwQH7AEf9zlj2fDeWPi8wveu1xCoL8fZsuvslOPTqawI_DYZrT8dpDAlImhap_OzQQAVOSYNeDrltEB6ZjvwjLrMxWpgUt2520i-lSz3Bz18aY5FMsP49eIRs7s3Iwuynlv8OC-xx0e_c-7ivQ3nJShZTx6hnhPJT_e38T51ODjoJ8U8S-NDBSrRoB7iVpdNFwPz7fZHxreq-2Kw7xGsLf6h4WyrPBLc-NsCx2HxgRzkJlU00RBLnHzTgwn5NOTJ7bz4zi2CHy8L2xh3UJEmuS8JyEIJpOZFY%3D)

subject: Tax Day is over...
body:
Next year's could be even worse| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=2289bedb9da24423a5811fc3cf7098fc&_e=9jT-4qDH4iLsqHZGR6O7MAOiJIGrBUIf77z_8SzR9MFeYlpCi5WYXpCR4DFlH92VOliTaeW1F7BzMHQsiKA8aC5Y86elTensPdoYx76_3BPWlK-h5VgQYbASR4j6xCdKRoNPaN5Y0xbqrTuhIFDdWFkyROL9yIL4uxlktRXcSHF9DGMUdIs_a4RyV3e0XHZzzXtorsP0Pwy5oSi9Xzra34jHY-Xr6KBFhQyjjOepjs8%3D)

| | Tax Day has come and gone, friend. With Joe Biden's inflation driving up the costs of food, gas, energy, housing, and everything in between, Tax Day hit American families harder than usual this year. **Now, Biden is threatening to raise taxes and make next year's Tax Day even worse than this year's.** **I know I'm not alone when I say I miss the days when presidents prioritized making our tax burden easier...__not harder.__** I'm reaching out to ask if you'd be willing to take my [__**Post-Tax Day Survey**__](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=2289bedb9da24423a5811fc3cf7098fc&_e=9jT-4qDH4iLsqHZGR6O7MAOiJIGrBUIf77z_8SzR9MFeYlpCi5WYXpCR4DFlH92VOliTaeW1F7BzMHQsiKA8aE9g7fNxYwIsm3HbHid-2t2tmz7iaegIhLeadSSfRBxHmv73CzWcSMTyxNtwrm5GBu9u1f8F59izU2EG_7FnTDJuE-gc2NllPpRcGm3fXnWXtpF4UL1mEm-NTC_7LS-BUYXQojXARGahHjWk9wyz9GE%3D) to get your thoughts on your tax burden, Biden's potential tax hikes, and other critical issues:
---
[**Click Here >> _2023 Post-Tax Day Survey_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=2289bedb9da24423a5811fc3cf7098fc&_e=9jT-4qDH4iLsqHZGR6O7MAOiJIGrBUIf77z_8SzR9MFeYlpCi5WYXpCR4DFlH92VOliTaeW1F7BzMHQsiKA8aBmMtJSDYbKSM08MzECZE_AZh8LN-xKf82lgG5w_Ied2LIXLTvDfDPal0k-MwAVTHWFgSbU7_rpjFtiArfPK7nkOXvYTIfEOsEDEx3_fTMX2m7quUE9l1mqu9MyirUNWRdTsDKNgpxkF5jcXZzQ_-i4%3D)

| | I'm committed to keeping our taxes low, and your responses help me understand what I can do to keep fighting for Wisconsin families. Thank you for your support,
**Glenn Grothman**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Update on our lawsuit
body:
we still need help | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/lawsuit-update?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

The last 72 hours have been a whirlwind. [Our lawsuit](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f8a6ef758b&e=9828080a05) against Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice has garnered national attention, despite media silence in Minnesota. I am beyond grateful for the nearly-1500 people who have joined our cause. We are close to reaching our stretch goal of $150,000. Will you help us achieve that goal by giving this morning? [Any amount helps, whether its $5 or $500.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c5210d0490&e=9828080a05)

It is so critical that we take this lawsuit as high as we need to, in order to ensure that doctors and all other professions have free speech rights. The government was weaponized against me 5 times, and we are going to make sure that can never happen again to others. That's why I'm taking Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice to court.

Will you [give](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c6088c63b4&e=9828080a05) or [share t](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6c3b5b470d&e=9828080a05)[his effort](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=bb7bcb7452&e=9828080a05) with friends and neighbors by clicking the thumbnail below?
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2c52438bd8&e=9828080a05)
---
| Our campaign has become a trending campaign on the fundraising platform "[GiveSendGo](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0a9cbfd468&e=9828080a05)." Please pray about it and consider donating. I have used my own resources to prepare this lawsuit and will continue to do so. Having your support would mean everything to my legal team and me. The Attorney General's office is going to have unlimited money, but we're confident that the Constitution will prevail in court.

Are you in? Will you stand with us and the millions of people whose lives were forever changed because they had the courage to tell the truth? [Let's go on offense for once](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=de113361a9&e=9828080a05)!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

Friend, in 2022, with the odds stacked against us, Democrats made history by holding down and expanding our Senate majority. **After the conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in June, and Republicans started threatening a national abortion ban, we knew we couldn't rest for a second.**

Now, the GOP has taken back the House, and they're using their power at every level of government to attack our fundamental rights. Just earlier this month, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas overturned FDA approval of mifepristone, the most commonly used method of abortion in America.

And now, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has signed a bill to ban abortion after just six weeks – a point at which most women don't even know they are pregnant.

We need to get to work today if we want to have a chance at protecting our reproductive rights and holding Republicans accountable for their blatant attacks on our fundamental freedoms.

Our membership numbers will help determine whether or not we're able to keep control of the Senate and the White House and flip the House to stop a national abortion ban. I need you to stand with me and American Bridge to defeat the Republicans who are on a warpath to ban abortion nationwide.
**[Please, friend, help me reach our goal of activating 1,000 new April Democratic Memberships by midnight. Rush $25 right now. I need you with me in this fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62186944/402613147/-498614040?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2501-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0ZjU3NzcwLWQ3ZTEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wdNyu7isuS889CHPCwEDgQFp6mWrw7P_ZTSWsl98KtA=)**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:
1.
Experts
at
FiveThirtyEight
say
that
Nevada
could
once
again
decide
Senate
control,
which
means
so
many
Democratic
priorities
hinge
on
whether
we’re
able
to
defend
this
crucial
battleground
seat.

2.
Races
in
Nevada
are
won
and
lost
by
razor-thin
margins.
The
last
Senate
race
here
came
down
to
just
7,928
votes
–
making
it
the
closest
in
the
entire
country.
Meanwhile,
we
lost
Nevada’s
governorship
by
only
1.5
points.

3.
The
Washington
Post
reports
that
I’m
one
of
the
most
vulnerable
senators
up
for
reelection
in
2024.
Now,
the
GOP
is
coming
after
me
as
a
TOP
target
for
defeat
–
and
national
Republicans
have
already
launched
their
first
wave
of
attack
ads
against
me.
With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend:
So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
Thank you so much, friend. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful.
– Jacky Rosen

clean_body: I wanted to personally share the big news, friend: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split $25 between my campaign and Serve America today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory [] . But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to reach 10,000 Reelection Founding Donors – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, friend: So please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Serve America to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [] DONATE [] Thank you so much, friend. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful. – Jacky Rosen [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .
