name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This Horrible GOP Extremist Won By Only 1600 Votes Last Time And Must Lose!
body:
Emily Busch for Michigan!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3782398d-840e-4c5c-ac61-7781a3e296f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[_This Horrible GOP Extremist Won By Only 1600 Votes Last Time And Must Lose!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fbc3706-f37f-4ad4-a99e-6a154c1ae17f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_The extremist Congressman--in one of our top opportunities to give Democrats a House Majority--is NRA backed John James, from Michigan’s 10th District, who wants to let every terrorist and criminal have a gun._** **_Meanwhile, an incredible Democrat has jumped in the race. Emily Busch went through hell and back on Nov. 30th, 2021, when her son was at Oxford High School as a mass shooter--a terrorist armed by GOP policy--murdered four and injured seven with a weapon he NEVER should have had._** _Her son Andrew had to run for his life, and luckily he survived. But in the long tradition of Mothers Against Drunk Driving and Moms Demand Action, she wasn't going to just go on with her life, feeling lucky. __**She wept for the four sets of parents whose kids didn't come home, and decided to do something about it.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38f6d4b8-89b1-4837-bd84-c677ea4d14d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We need public servants like Busch who care about their community and run not for power, but what's right. For these very same reasons, Rep. James, who won by the skin of his teeth last time, MUST become an ex-Congressman._ [**_Busch just kicked off her campaign. Will you join us in helping her gear up immediately by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this brave, empathetic mother & congressional candidate, so we can take the House and pass the gun safety measures we so desperately need?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td08132eb-70b7-4ca7-9268-802b2535e959/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for trying to put an end to our country's gun madness._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb57e05f9-1ab0-4e1a-8ce4-ba14eb04a856/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: One week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Your support today can have a HUGE impact down the road when it matters most.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=88%2E791427%2EFa8yhK)
Friends —
We know you didn't wake up this morning planning to contribute to Ilhan Omar's re-election campaign, but that's exactly what we're about to ask you to do.
Here's why:
Just ONE WEEK from today, we close the books on our April fundraising, and we're tracking behind where we need to be.
That's important, because April already tends to be one of our slower months for online donations.
It's _especially_ important when you fund a campaign the way we do, where the bulk of our support comes from grassroots, small-dollar donations.
Even a slight dip in donations or dollars raised can mean not hitting our goals for the month. And believe it or not, that can have a huge impact down the road when it matters most.
So, long story short, we have an important week ahead of us. Seven days to get back on track. And we need your help to do it. Please:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can afford — to stand with Ilhan and our re-election campaign today? The resources we raise early on have a huge impact down the line, so please know that your support makes a difference.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230423-1-t1&t=2&akid=88%2E791427%2EFa8yhK)**
As always, thank you for your support.
\- Team Ilhan

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Please give me a chance to explain, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is the truth
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
One week today, we close the books on our April fundraising deadline.
To be direct: we know the money we need to raise in order to reach the voters we need to win this race.
Along the way, we have monthly checkpoints we hope to hit. In these early stages, we don’t have to raise as much money as we will in 2024 — but we do have to hit our goals.
We have to hit them to build the foundation of this campaign. We have to hit them because we know what our opponents have in the bank and need to be ready when they start spending.
And right now, we’re short of our April goals. Not crazily short. But we had a slow start to the month.
So my hope is that with one week to go, we can close that gap.
We haven’t generated as many new donors to the campaign as I’d like, so today I am really hoping people who have never given online before can chip in. What do you say?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to my campaign for Senate. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. Please do it before this monthly deadline ends.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr23.gQdVKi&refcode=em230423&t=1&akid=584%2E734936%2EtNKMjZ)

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Behind closed doors
body:
Democrats in Olympia have been carving up a $70 billion budget behind closed doors. They have done away with any public budget negotiations and - in doing so - have left the media with the need to highlight other stories. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731918:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session is almost at an end - and Democrats have passed troubling legislation in the dead of night to hide what they are doing from voters. But we're working overtime exposing their actions. So, as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
First-term Republican Representative Sam Low (39th LD) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Representative Low is a member of the powerful House Rules Committee, as well as the Transportation Committee, the Housing Committee, and the State Government/Tribal Affairs Committee. He shared his thoughts on disappointing bills passed by Democrats, like their watered-down version of police pursuit reform, the liberal drug possession measure, the erosion of parental rights, and stricter gun restrictions which he believes the courts will rule are unconstitutional. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731919:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r).

**This week 's top story...**
Olympia Democrats demonstrated, once again, that they believe crime is relative and just because you end up shooting someone you shouldn't face consequences. House Bill 1324 prohibits a court from including juvenile court convictions when considering sentencing for crimes committed as an adult. So, just as long as you don't actually kill anyone when you're under 18 years old, the Democrats don't want those actions to impact for future jail time. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731920:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r).

**In case you missed it ...**
Democrats in Olympia have been carving up a $70 billion budget behind closed doors. They have done away with any public budget negotiations and - in doing so - have left the media with the need to highlight other stories. Thus, one media outlet decided to report on how Democrats increasingly need to hide what they are working on from the public, punching more holes in the state's public records act. Of course, the reporter did that without blaming the Democrats. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731921:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r).

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [clicking here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731922:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r). | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61731923:sf5IniDUN:m:1:2610672541:52D0C61AF495C38A2CA977123028FE89:r)

I’m all in to defeat Mark Robinson.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199244/402647925/823540626?refcode=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9yDaFyk9HaJ7FomHMseOXc0y1lNmrxtPSQK9an-dYMY=&emci=c9d15900-71e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson just announced he’s running for governor. We must defeat him — and we will. Together. **[I’m setting a goal to raise $5,000 in the next 24 hours to defeat Robinson. Make a donation right now to prevent a far-right extremist from gaining power and taking us backward>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199246/402647936/435245919?refcode=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9yDaFyk9HaJ7FomHMseOXc0y1lNmrxtPSQK9an-dYMY=)**
* * *
Peter — I’m proud of how far we’ve come — the progress we’ve made for our state — in the six years since I became governor. We repealed the disastrous, cruel “Bathroom Bill” that discriminated against LGBTQ+ North Carolinians. We’ve taken substantive action to protect our climate. We’ve defended reproductive rights. We came to a bipartisan agreement to expand Medicaid. **But if a radical right-winger like Mark Robinson takes office, all that progress would be at risk.** Peter, Robinson has made his position clear: He’s only focused on far-right culture war issues. He would likely seek to ban abortion, support absurd and hurtful restrictions on what and how public school teachers are allowed to teach, and roll back our efforts to fight climate change. He has said that men, not women, should be our leaders, that LGTBQ+ people are filth, that it’s questionable that the Holocaust occurred, and that climate change is a lie. That should be enough to disqualify him from office in our great state. Not to mention his threatening and dangerous positions like: “I got them AR-15s in case the government gets too big for its britches.” North Carolina was just rated the top state in the country for business. Under a Governor Robinson, companies would flee from his divisive culture wars — just like they did when HB2 passed. **[Mark Robinson cannot become the next governor of North Carolina. We can’t allow it. Please, join me and fight back by donating $25, or anything you can, right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199248/402647937/435245919?amount=25&refcode=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9yDaFyk9HaJ7FomHMseOXc0y1lNmrxtPSQK9an-dYMY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199249/402647939/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.e00c2081-e7e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9yDaFyk9HaJ7FomHMseOXc0y1lNmrxtPSQK9an-dYMY=)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: DeSantis’ abortion ban
body:
As DeSantis ramps up his attacks on our rights, our trustworthy reporting is critical to keep Floridians up to speed.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)
Peter, Ron DeSantis just signed off on **one of the most restrictive abortion bans** in the country.
Between trips to Ohio, New Hampshire, and Virginia for his suspected presidential run, DeSantis jetted back to Florida to sign this devastating bill — all while parts of the state were battered by catastrophic floods.
[**Before we get into what this bill means for Floridians and what our local news team,****_Floricua_****, is doing to hold DeSantis accountable: will you chip in $5 to power the work of our on-the-ground reporters?** ](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3666?refcode=em-20230423&t=2&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)
As DeSantis ramps up his attacks, their trustworthy reporting is critical to keep Floridians up to speed on what exactly is in the bill. **Just take a look at the pieces our reporters have put out over the past few weeks:**
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3666?refcode=em-20230423&t=3&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)
Their stories have informed readers about the beyond-strict and limiting elements of this ban, including the provision that forces victims of rape, incest, or human trafficking to provide criminal or medical evidence before they can receive an abortion.
Their honest, real-time reporting has also kept the spotlight on DeSantis’ extreme, conservative agenda and held him accountable for his attacks on reproductive rights, education, and the trans community.
**The work of our _Floricua_ team is essential as DeSantis considers a White House run and tries to spread his rageful platform across the country. **
[**If you believe in their efforts to hold DeSantis accountable, will you chip in $5 now? Our work is only possible because of the support of grassroots donors like you:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3666?refcode=em-20230423&t=4&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3666?refcode=em-20230423&t=5&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)**
Thanks for sticking with us,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=894_120351_87qeQ2&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=894%2E120351%2E87qeQ2)

Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja
body:
Peter, I know it's Sunday -- but I need you to see this. I've been a dedicated Congressman since January 2017 -- days before Donald Trump's destructive presidency began. I've put in the work and taken historic action with my Democratic colleagues. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The GOP and its enablers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
This is a big moment for our movement. I’ve been leading Congressional Democrats in a fight to deliver the core of our progressive agenda — **an agenda that puts the people first.** We’re fighting for a future that isn’t controlled by insurrection-supporting, election-denying Republicans, fossil fuel lobbyists, Big Pharma, and corporate America.
Our side has grassroots energy, strength, and resolve. **The other side has unlimited amounts of money to dump into attack ads to influence policy and elections.** We have the people _and_ the power to fight for a Democratic agenda that invests in working people, families, and our communities. But only if we keep proving the power of our progressive movement by showing up at every fight for the next two years.
[**So, Peter, will you chip in $3 to help our movement maintain our momentum this cycle? Let’s show corporate America and the GOP’s special interest groups who has the real power.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41700?refcode=em20230423-2400&t=1&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41700?refcode=em20230423-2400&t=20&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)**
Historic investments in climate and infrastructure, lowering healthcare costs, major gun reform, millions of new jobs, expanding care for veterans, and more.
Democrats did that in just 2 years — and we were just getting started. There’s no denying that we’re up against new challenges now with a Republican majority hell-bent on stripping away our progress.**But I know what we’re capable of, and I won’t stop fighting. I need you with me, Peter.**
**We need to show the GOP and their corporate and billionaire buddies that we won’t back down.[Can you chip in to show everyone that our movement remains strong?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41700?refcode=em20230423-2400&t=21&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41700?refcode=em20230423-2400&t=22&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230423-2400-footer&t=23&refcode2=2400_420207_zF5q2C&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2400%2E420207%2EzF5q2C)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: our campaign bills are due – I need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
In the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.
| | |
---
_Hi – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt and now we have a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.**[Before I go on, will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199601/402648865/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2261-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vdbocdQ0Zj47-uImTLGCSSzPOe1VJAFLk_eghIHEovo=)**_
|
---
Look – in the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.

GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED. Polls tightened to within a point or two. Outside spending was through the roof.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making quick decisions with the information we had, hoping that the additional funding we needed would come through.

Despite our best efforts, the necessary funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has some bills left to pay. We've made a pretty good dent in it so far, but we've still got a little more to go. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help:

**[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us pay down these remaining bills? I’d be grateful for anything you can give, and it’ll really help me focus on legislating (not fundraising!).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199602/402648866/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2261-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vdbocdQ0Zj47-uImTLGCSSzPOe1VJAFLk_eghIHEovo=)**

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.

If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62199603/402648867/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2261-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjBjMjA4MS1lN2UxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vdbocdQ0Zj47-uImTLGCSSzPOe1VJAFLk_eghIHEovo=)**

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Team,
**FIRST:** Mandela launched The Long Run to support and empower changemaking, pro-democracy candidates to win critical races across the country.
**THEN:** We had **4,887** grassroots supporters step up to support Mandela's mission, and even WIN races that will determine the future of our democracy.
Already, our fundraising efforts for Judge Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin helped her be elected to the State Supreme Court and win a liberal majority for the first time in 14 years! This team and our movement had a role in protecting reproductive and voting rights in Wisconsin.
But that's not all. We have supported a number of other Senate candidates who are fighting to protect our Democratic Senate Majority — Elizabeth Warren, Tammy Baldwin, Jon Tester, and Jacky Rosen — and we are just getting started.
**NOW:** We need your help to continue supporting trailblazing candidates across the country in making lasting change. But before we can continue supporting other candidates, we need the resources to continue funding our movement.
[**So can you step up and contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to The Long Run? Your contribution will help us continue to impact races across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230423-1-t2&t=1&akid=4382%2E196590%2EX-J6B2)

We have already made such a big impact in Wisconsin and we can continue to do that around the country if we have your support. This is just the beginning. I hope you are in this fight with us in _the long run._
The team at The Long Run

name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Can I explain something, folks?

I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.

In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.**

Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.

I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.

The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.

**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**

[**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between Voter Protection Project and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43904?t=6&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43905?t=7&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43906?t=8&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43907?t=9&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43908?t=10&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43909?t=11&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).

— Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7268%2E878179%2E1RDEzg)

I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We're traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we're praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can't do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._eEiq-AYUqqnLCNbZh9_uA)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-4Y6zmffRw) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._LFa__DBq6FaPcJRfQ) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._gLuUseDQ)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTEzLWE3YjgyMzRjM2IyNjQ2ODg4ZDVmZWRkMzg3YzQ4M2UyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/kLoQYpvE0hsFF9XlHhLpuQ) to unsubscribe.
---

Friend, 75 million Americans are over the age of 60 — and that number will only grow in the years ahead. But elderly Americans all across the country are struggling to afford housing, food and health care. **_Right now, Washington is failing seniors._**
As a member of the **[_Special Committee on Aging_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62208232/402680869/-18479537?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4083-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2JiMWRiYi0wOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4puOMbk3uUrU1qK089MFvjkUkHAKcj8iOhxh5YBEwLE=&emci=16e2b268-4fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3cbb1dbb-09e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)** , Kirsten Gillibrand is fighting every day to address this crisis. And now, she's released a new 5-point Master Plan on Aging to help seniors age with dignity. Here's what Kirsten's plan will do:
* Invest in programs to give seniors **access to affordable, nutritious food.**

* Ensure that seniors can **afford high-quality health care** by expanding Medicare benefits and lowering prescription drug costs.

* **Increase Social Security benefits** and fight scammers to make sure that seniors have economic security.

* Create more opportunities for seniors to **live in their own homes** and access the trained caregivers they need.

* Invest in low-cost, accessible, aging-friendly spaces and jobs so that seniors can **lead independent lives.**

But to get this legislation passed, Kirsten is counting on activists like you to stand with her. **[Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to support Kirsten's plan and tell Washington that you believe seniors should age with dignity? We're counting on 5,000 signatures before midnight, so please, sign on now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62208233/402680870/-18479537?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4083-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2JiMWRiYi0wOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4puOMbk3uUrU1qK089MFvjkUkHAKcj8iOhxh5YBEwLE=&emci=16e2b268-4fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3cbb1dbb-09e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

name: Nick A., DLCC.org
subject: Your triple-match offer
body:
Our progressive future in the states rests on hitting our fundraising goals each month, so I’m asking you to invest in this fight today. | | |
---
| | I’m Nick Andricola, Director of Online Fundraising here at the DLCC. I’m reaching out today ahead of our first deadline of the new quarter to ask you to [ chip in **$7** or any amount to our grassroots movement to elect state Democrats and have it matched _three times_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVkn0Zydx3rv__1EwL7UGj-R-aI0OGaR6X4Cr64jjW3mX8Qc-qrrJeZfRN5p7Gh1wgelx9g0_nrwuTXnSV89RtycqByNiCQQopdE_3_q2p4jzyneS2bYmTgQ-9Ei-TcqZmW8iAiv6F2xq3qPx0q8kBqugUjagwbeAlse23WhWQvjb5NjjKEWv---vx51ER3etn8e9OCb3fZtQ3Vmd31bwRg_2gw8J4bM5TG0laswBfIrZA5tXscihVFZ1mThwALKypBfWypJMoJI9qiF4ydCqttq4HYRfVZ_il0U_fEWYYkuMFiayI7mPROVpmeZAt-xwJL1cG0eFClpacgsXuOfwZohv8_rEpXaKhhPZJqWFu_Ag2UB2MvKrh24TKh7-lo759v0dI8jpg6TNSdvM_hbliBC3aEoFG9Y826YN2tSHlxLtDvx5-ZMni41xri-9Clmtvdcwa91GUmWeK09YjGr9TokQk2SYUBacxxshX3UNWTr8ezC3kLrs3WaRzmXDAMl-UCiTq3DNlVxRyu_e2r8jTJEQ/3vl/c8FKm353SYWwr_zQZmLwZg/h0/_m0HlwJJA6FWu7yDn_2lbNOwuFmJoqyijCxlTo9soGM) – but first, let me explain why your gift today is so important: Next month, Democrats are facing eight critical special elections in key states like my home state of Pennsylvania. PA Dems flipped the state House last November thanks to your support – and next month’s elections will decide whether or not they get to keep control. These races are gearing up to be competitive – so it’s essential that we give state Democrats the resources they need to WIN against their extreme opponents, defend our majorities, and hold the GOP accountable. **And that starts with hitting our critical**$150,000** April fundraising goal before next Sunday’s deadline. ** [We only have a week left and right now we’re tracking behind our goal. [Source: _The National Pulse_]

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is the Missouri I know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley doesn’t know the Missouri I know. **Let me explain:**
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can start this thing off strong and get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31629?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31628?refcode=em20230423-3028&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230423-3028-footer&t=14&refcode2=3028_614464_TjTvn6&akid=3028%2E614464%2ETjTvn6)**

name: Letitia James
subject: only $26.39
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
**$26.39.**
**[That’s the average gift that my campaign receives from grassroots donors like Seléna P. and Marcus W. over email, and that’s the amount I’m about to ask you to donate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62201698/402657773/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1052-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTk4ZmNlMi1lZmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cs4C12cPSieQfIN4v8yZHfOIWoXMdDAs4FN0bLh-suM=)****Here’s why:**
Ever since I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker _ever_ to be elected as New York's attorney general, I have fought tirelessly to bring a voice to the voiceless and put agency back in the hands of the people. And I'll be honest, Peter, my work has made me a _lot_ of enemies.
After generations of politicians catering almost exclusively to the powerful and corrupt, my fight for progress, justice, and accountability was a cold shock to the most powerful forces in our nation – **and now, they're attempting to undermine me at _every_ turn.**
Peter, the powerful and corrupt failed to kick me out of office and replace me with my far-right opponent last November, but that doesn't mean their attacks have stopped. And, with reproductive rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and more hanging in the balance, I'm relying on this team _more than ever_ to join my fight for progress so I can continue to fight for what's right with everything I have.
**That's why I'm counting _you_****to help keep my fight for progress fueled during this critical moment for our nation. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

[**Will you rush a donation of $26.39, my average donation via email, to help me continue my fight for the voiceless and****vulnerable****– especially now that the powerful and corrupt are working hard to stop me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62201700/402657775/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=26.39&refcode=jtk1052-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTk4ZmNlMi1lZmUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cs4C12cPSieQfIN4v8yZHfOIWoXMdDAs4FN0bLh-suM=)

name: Read/Act News
subject: Counter the 1619 Project
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you’re having a great day so far. I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I’m talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”](http://trk.readactnews._6Ug)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” now a multi-part series streaming online. The “1619 Project” locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery—and the project’s main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That’s why we’ve turned our online course,[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”](http://trk.readactnews.-bnwlEV6yQ) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—essential to restoring free government. You’ll be excited to learn that **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation—the opposite of our nation’s unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of **[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”](http://trk.readactnews.)** for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://trk.readactnews.)** Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” says, our nation’s history is unifying. That’s why we’ve produced a full, unbiased account of America’s past with **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://trk.readactnews._dfvzsDdJHGSFPiwIhnC6Q)** Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. |
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMTMtNjA5YzM2NWNhMGIyNGMzYjhkYzlmOTI1NjNiZjk3NDEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/ii-1Cm1qlb-JdKAd8VBjuw) to unsubscribe.

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: We’ve knocked on thousands of doors already!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0bTgivbOYKC6GwSwgxv2QnTKqzYGXDdczfr0ly2RXkeScH4qTmhpt3OQV-331JIwNXzMJVE6TyJ5Xyvk9aZD-LiKiMTyEj2FVRvrjxOsWOeHTzHU2tIyZd0=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)
---
| Hi Peter,
In January I thought my campaign had enough door hangers to last us through June--on Tuesday we had to order more. Together, since the beginning of February, we've knocked nearly 6,000 doors in the past several weeks across my newly redrawn district!
This re-election is going to be my toughest yet since the redrawn HD-38 is six points to the right of my previous district. We are taking nothing for granted, which is why we're on track to knock every door in the district--twice!
[Can you help us keep our canvassers out knocking doors by making a contribution today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0SW165RFNGUSUwdiHqC82JHITd5JqAmQ1WEPRzINIZLjo2EGsk4fSd3m_6M95JF7q65pgooHtZMxv99lywCq-EeaLpXiWZsKNsE-1CKi1Neqg91n2YqJmsZ07tTZpNuF6_uht7wcxQ958WosBq_lDjA=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0XOYT_Ho-q9jCtHpTwg9c5aYzCCevI33DmS_JVWwDervmaXITDYcpd6CDo_5fUTTrDPGhbtLb5nUCoH_3ayKbENTRKvObuc8OS51kfgNKie8&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)
---
As those of you who've supported me for a long time know, I love knocking doors. It's the best way to connect with my constituents, hear directly from them, and work to earn their support!
To win this November, I need the votes of people from all across Roanoke, some I've never represented before. The best way to do that is canvassing. Knocking on doors is how we win in 2023, with your support today I can head back out and continue speaking with voters across HD-38!
[My campaign is ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0SW165RFNGUSUwdiHqC82JHITd5JqAmQ1WEPRzINIZLjo2EGsk4fSd3m_6M95JF7q65pgooHtZMxv99lywCq-EeaLpXiWZsKNsE-1CKi1Neqg91n2YqJmsZ07tTZpNuF6_uht7wcxQ958WosBq_lDjA=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)[funded by individual donors like you](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0SW165RFNGUSUwdiHqC82JHITd5JqAmQ1WEPRzINIZLjo2EGsk4fSd3m_6M95JF7q65pgooHtZMxv99lywCq-EeaLpXiWZsKNsE-1CKi1Neqg91n2YqJmsZ07tTZpNuF6_uht7wcxQ958WosBq_lDjA=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)[ because I won't accept a single cent from corporate PACs and special interests, can you chip in today support my grassroots campaign today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0SW165RFNGUSUwdiHqC82JHITd5JqAmQ1WEPRzINIZLjo2EGsk4fSd3m_6M95JF7q65pgooHtZMxv99lywCq-EeaLpXiWZsKNsE-1CKi1Neqg91n2YqJmsZ07tTZpNuF6_uht7wcxQ958WosBq_lDjA=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)
---
Thank you for your support!
My very best,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xKCzJEkKs6EEeTjOKsRHtGEkubXSB768iKraIoRHICwVkMCsxnkz0bTgivbOYKC6GwSwgxv2QnTKqzYGXDdczfr0ly2RXkeScH4qTmhpt3OQV-331JIwNXzMJVE6TyJ5Xyvk9aZD-LiKiMTyEj2FVRvrjxOsWOeHTzHU2tIyZd0=&c=x3otneBP1y6Z-FlkyVuw-NSzbJudxSfq3sWVcJDEZ105k9H7FMZqYg==&ch=O75iNBo637ceIiMCT9gemHhMyGksrLGX5840UoqDVbDpqkODOfgPLw==)

name: Voting Rights Watch (via the NDRC)
subject: “ready to slap voters in the face” – inside the latest GOP attacks on voting rights >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, since the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie has inspired nearly half of all states to pass dozens of new voter suppression laws. But now, Republicans in key states are working to restrict ballot access _even further_. **As long as Republicans are committed to using the myth of voter fraud as a pretense to attack voting rights, we must be just as committed to fighting back. Will you pitch in to support the NDRC’s work?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**Looking at what the GOP is doing across the country, it’s easy to see that A.G. Holder is 100% right, team:**
→ After passing legislation restricting vote-by-mail and limiting dropbox access in 2021, **Florida Republicans are working to make absentee voting even harder before 2024.**

→ **Virginia’s GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin reinstated a _lifetime_ ban on voting** for anyone with a prior felony conviction. The policy, which originally dates back to 1902, is one of the harshest policies in the country and will likely have a disproportionate impact on voters of color.

→ Earlier this year, Ohio Republicans passed strict new requirements for in-person voting. Now, in a move commentators say “slap[s] voters in the face,” the legislature is working **to make it harder for voters to approve protections for abortion rights** by changing the rules for amending the state constitution.

[**_Republicans aren’t backing down in their attacks on voting rights, so we can’t back down in our fight to protect ballot access and strengthen democracy. Can we count on you to pitch in?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62202752/402661809/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230423_FR_4K_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkYmM3NmZmLWYxZTEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o7dyzdQ0AAJF3mao0Vd4idaT4FhsooaVAbC5K2rsYR8=)

Friend,
I made a MAJOR promise to once again release a list of names from which I will choose future Supreme Court justices.
You have the right to know exactly what you’re voting for. I want you to know what you’re getting out of a second Trump Presidency.
**And to ensure that our next Supreme Court justice embodies _YOUR_ values, I’ve put together a survey for YOU to tell me the type of justice you want me to appoint.**
That way, the next Supreme Court justice won’t just be picked by me... but also by _**YOU**_ – the American people.

| | | This is the hardest thing we've ever had to say.

The GOP's efforts to secure our elections against the Left have fallen flat.

And now we've received heartbreaking news that Democrats want to erase every Voter ID law in the country.

We've reached out to conservatives everywhere to orchestrate a massive response, but so far, hardly anyone has responded.

We hate to reach out again, but the truth is, we're concerned.

**We 're asking our most elite supporters like you, Peter, one final time: Will you help Republicans enact Voter ID laws in every state & finally stop the Left's attack on our elections?**

We CAN'T let Democrats get away with this. If they end Voter ID laws, they may never lose another election again & Republicans will be powerless to fight back.

Democrats are relying on you to ignore our pleas and look the other way.

The future of the Republican party is depending on you. The future of our country is depending on you.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I was given a choice.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62203388/402664327/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU3M2Q1Zi1mNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbbzcyJaDiYN6Zzcw2zy8n4zUt1jd8lOJbpG4GEXJYo=)
I don't share this story often, Peter.

Before I came home to Illinois, I was a meteorologist at a local station in Tyler, Texas.

One morning, my boss approached me and said we needed to speak after the show.

When I got to the conference room, I saw my employment contract laid out on the desk. Next to it was a print out of my profile from a gay dating website.

I was told I had a choice: **to be _"that person"_ in the profile, or "have a job."**

I decided then and there to resign and move back to Illinois.

That was 20 years ago, and the reason I’m sharing this story now, is because I never imagined the LGBTQ community would be experiencing the surge in discrimination it is today.

We've seen far-right politicians banning LGBTQ books from schools and libraries. Just this week, Republicans passed a bill to ban transgender youth from girl's sports.

Imagine what gay and trans kids may think seeing this in the news? I can tell you for a fact I'd be feeling scared, isolated, and ashamed.

**These attacks are a reminder of why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting youth who may already feel marginalized.**

[**I’m ready to stand up to the anti-LGBTQ agenda in Congress, but it's going to take a team effort to get this done. Please contribute $3 to my re-election campaign, and help me defeat these bigoted attacks on our community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62203389/402664328/-665437442?refcode=em-4.23.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU3M2Q1Zi1mNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbbzcyJaDiYN6Zzcw2zy8n4zUt1jd8lOJbpG4GEXJYo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62203390/402664329/-665437442?refcode=em-4.23.23-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU3M2Q1Zi1mNWUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbbzcyJaDiYN6Zzcw2zy8n4zUt1jd8lOJbpG4GEXJYo=)

Thanks for hearing me out,

Eric

clean_body: | = I don't share this story often, Peter. Before I came home to Illinois, I was a meteorologist at a local station in Tyler, Texas. One morning, my boss approached me and said we needed to speak after the show. When I got to the conference room, I saw my employment contract laid out on the desk. Next to it was a print out of my profile from a gay dating website. I was told I had a choice: to be "that person" in the profile, or "have a job." I decided then and there to resign and move back to Illinois. That was 20 years ago, and the reason I’m sharing this story now, is because I never imagined the LGBTQ community would be experiencing the surge in discrimination it is today. We've seen far-right politicians banning LGBTQ books from schools and libraries. Just this week, Republicans passed a bill to ban transgender youth from girl's sports. Imagine what gay and trans kids may think seeing this in the news? I can tell you for a fact I'd be feeling scared, isolated, and ashamed. These attacks are a reminder of why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting youth who may already feel marginalized. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for hearing me out, Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. subject: ALERT: Sunday Review of Conservative News
body:
Don't miss IR's important update Monday night, where we will be live with the 45th President and presidential candidate Donald J. Trump!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7465c4c5d8e8/alert-sunday-review-of-conservative-news?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Uihlein-Funded PAC Pays Political Consultants $142,000 While Spending Just $3700 to Support Conservative School Board Candidates, Disclosures Reveal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The Richard Uihlein-funded People Who Play By The Rules PAC, in recent quarterly disclosures, reported $1.3 million cash-on-hand – but the disclosures also reveal that the PAC paid three political consultants (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) $142,000, while spending just $3,725.56 to support conservative school board candidates over the last several months, records reveal.

The founder, president and treasurer of the PAC received the majority of the consulting fees, totaling
$75,000 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Starfish Consulting LLC (https://search.sunbiz.org/Inquiry/CorporationSearch/GetDocument?aggregateId=domp-p22000083002-94abc188-b195-45c5-9ba2-c8db36cc1ecc&transactionId=p22000083002-304b1e96-638f-4bc2-8f19-ef0e9559bdd4&formatType=PDF&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , while the rest went to a consulting firm owned by Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/tag/keith-pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who was paid $26,000 (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) through Fahrenheit Consulting Group (https://disclosures-clerk.house.gov/public_disc/financial-pdfs/2022/8219040.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , while $41,000
(https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedExpenditures.aspx?FiledDocID=b0OdOIkpqpvSieWU0B0i2A%3d%3d&ExpenditureType=7PO3RGHF2W%2fsyStv1naW9vd6PLmRT8u2mEDnPt%2bcsAk%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) went to a consulting firm owned by Michael Koolidge (TMKS, LLC (https://disclosures-clerk.house.gov/public_disc/financial-pdfs/2021/10044273.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ), who also serves as the PAC’s communications director (https://dekalbtimes.com/stories/628308281-koolidge-on-joining-pbr-pac-why-i-ran-for-congress-was-to-move-beyond-words-and-into-real-action?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and chief spokesperson.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/uihlein-funded-pac-pays-political-consultants-142000-while-spending-just-3700-to-support-conservative-school-board-candidates-disclosures-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://youtu.be/ffNKfEREvs8?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Robbins Mayor Darren Bryant Fires 'Law and Order' Police Chief as Payback for Filing Whistleblower Complaint Alleging Abuse of Power, Endangering the Community (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Robbins Police Chief David Sheppard has only been on the job for eighteen months, but in that short period of time, he’s quadrupled the number of police officers patrolling the streets; he’s overseen a dramatic reduction in violent crimes, including sexual assaults and aggravated battery; and the homicide rate has decreased by over 90 percent.

But late last week, Mayor Darren Bryant fired Sheppard only a day after the police chief filed a whistleblower complaint against the mayor, alleging illegal and unethical behavior – citing several examples, including the mayor’s request to move a vehicle from the scene of a fatal car accident in the middle of a police investigation, potentially tainting the evidence, and demanding that Sheppard hire an individual with ties to the mayor despite concerns following that individual’s background check.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://youtu.be/hKp6v_ozpgc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Di Leo: A Violent Criminal Goes Free, and Communities Are Left to Mourn (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-a-violent-criminal-goes-free-and-communities-are-left-to-mourn.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Thousands of people are shot, stabbed, beaten, run over – assaulted and murdered – in America’s inner cities, every day. In ones and twos, in fives and tens. Drug crimes, gang wars, imagined insults, intentionally-taught hostility – a cult of violence.

When the law-and-order minded conservatives – known as the Right – remind the public of the reasons behind this violence – the welfare state, the pop culture, the easy jail sentences, the early release of prisoners who should have been kept in jail – the Left often accuses us of disregarding all other inputs, and basing our policies on the color, the poverty, the “challenges” of the perpetrators.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-a-violent-criminal-goes-free-and-communities-are-left-to-mourn.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/opinion-a-violent-criminal-goes-free-and-communities-are-left-to-mourn.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Mayor Keith Pekau Attacks Orland Park and Chicago Firefighters With Baseless Accusations, Calls First Responders an "Embarrassment to Their Profession" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-orland-park-and-chicago-firefighters-with-baseless-accusations-calls-first-responders-an-embarrassment-to-their-profession.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
During Monday night’s Orland Park Village Board Meeting, Mayor Keith Pekau used his bully pulpit to level attacks against Orland Park and Chicago Firefighters, accusing the first responders – without any evidence or witnesses, of saying “horrible things” at polling locations about his close friend and ally, Rich Miller, who he endorsed as a trustee for the Fire District board – calling the firefighters an “embarrassment to their profession.” Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-orland-park-and-chicago-firefighters-with-baseless-accusations-calls-first-responders-an-embarrassment-to-their-profession.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://youtu.be/kDwNFi0bNHM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Why a Grading Scale for Political Consultants, to Include Online Reviews and Star Ratings, Can Help Candidates Start Winning Again (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

If a campaign consultant has a track record of losing races, then a candidate should know that. And if a campaign consultant has a track record of winning races — they should know that too.

By creating transparency and accountability – with realtime information, ratings and reviews, candidates will have the opportunity to make informed decisions – just like consumers do before buying a product or service – or in this case, investing in a campaign consultant.

And if this happens, candidates will be in a much better position to win by filling their team with consultants that bring with them a track record of winning.
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://youtu.be/qXolrqZ6ihA?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=51fb034330-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_22_08_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-51fb034330-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

body:
(And Reeves doesn’t) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204139/402667538/17860314?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)

Peter — Tate Reeves is out-of-touch with the real Mississippi. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204144/402667547/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204150/402667552/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)
---|---
On the left, you have Tate Reeves, a man born with a silver spoon in his mouth, a millionaire daddy, and powerful connections.

On the other hand, I grew up in a no-stoplight town. My childhood wasn't easy — my daddy was murdered when I was in third grade and my mama worked hard not to let my sister and me feel as poor as we really were.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204154/402667558/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)
When Tate Reeves launched his very first campaign, his wealthy daddy bankrolled his campaign with his money and contributions from his powerful special interest friends. He had it easy. And nothing has changed since.

But me? I’ve had to work for it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204158/402667563/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)
I bust my tail to connect with folks, meet voters where they’re at, and get them real results. That’s how I was elected as Mayor of Nettleton at 24 years old with 78 percent of the vote. Today, I proudly serve as a Public Service Commissioner.

The biggest difference between Reeves and me is pretty clear. He doesn’t know what it’s like to struggle like too many in our state do every day. He prioritizes special interests over the people of our state because that’s all he knows. On his watch, 220,000 working Mississippians are without healthcare and he hasn’t fixed the Jackson water crisis.

And let's not forget that Reeves is currently caught up in the middle of the worst public corruption scandal in Mississippi history.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204161/402667567/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)
On the other hand, I've delivered high-speed internet for families, cut taxes twice, stood up to special interests, and saved taxpayers over six billion dollars.

[I'm ready to lead Mississippi forward and send Reeves packing, but I can't do it without your support. With our first major statewide filing deadline coming up, every donation counts. Can you chip in any amount to help us crush our critical fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204163/402667571/-1470085607?refcode=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.88dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhkYWU5NDQtZjhlMS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-vCb1DpUhcBC0_QOAr_VqkJOekMA8zlk84RLQx5NB5s=)
