clean_body: (And Reeves doesn’t) | = Peter — Tate Reeves is out-of-touch with the real Mississippi. | = | = ---|--- On the left, you have Tate Reeves, a man born with a silver spoon in his mouth, a millionaire daddy, and powerful connections. On the other hand, I grew up in a no-stoplight town. My childhood wasn't easy — my daddy was murdered when I was in third grade and my mama worked hard not to let my sister and me feel as poor as we really were. = When Tate Reeves launched his very first campaign, his wealthy daddy bankrolled his campaign with his money and contributions from his powerful special interest friends. He had it easy. And nothing has changed since. But me? I’ve had to work for it. = I bust my tail to connect with folks, meet voters where they’re at, and get them real results. That’s how I was elected as Mayor of Nettleton at 24 years old with 78 percent of the vote. Today, I proudly serve as a Public Service Commissioner. The biggest difference between Reeves and me is pretty clear. He doesn’t know what it’s like to struggle like too many in our state do every day. He prioritizes special interests over the people of our state because that’s all he knows. On his watch, 220,000 working Mississippians are without healthcare and he hasn’t fixed the Jackson water crisis. And let's not forget that Reeves is currently caught up in the middle of the worst public corruption scandal in Mississippi history. = On the other hand, I've delivered high-speed internet for families, cut taxes twice, stood up to special interests, and saved taxpayers over six billion dollars. = = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support! Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I want you to hear it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
#
Hi there — I have exciting news to share, and I wanted you to hear it from me:
**I’m officially running for reelection to the United States Senate.**
I know the road ahead won’t always be easy — election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year. But with you by my side, I know we can get this done and win big next November.
[**So, will you help me start the first day of our reelection in the strongest position by splitting a donation between my campaign in Wisconsin and Robert Garcia today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204275/402667747/-1782790818?refcode2=94dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230423-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRhZTk0NC1mOGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNJIjRBZbpUcB2r0Iottk3K82Oeyl0RZr5EluaC3Yf0=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204276/402667748/-1782790818?refcode2=94dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230423-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRhZTk0NC1mOGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNJIjRBZbpUcB2r0Iottk3K82Oeyl0RZr5EluaC3Yf0=)**
I’m so proud of the progress we’ve made in the Senate over the past few years. We’ve lowered the price of prescription drugs, addressed the climate crisis with landmark investment in clean energy, expanded health care for millions of our veterans, and so much more.
A highlight of my time in the Senate was when _the Respect for Marriage Act_ , my bipartisan bill to protect marriage equality, was signed into law late last year. That’s a moment I will never forget.
But there’s a lot more to be done, and I’m not willing to give up the fight to make things easier, better, safer, and stronger for hard-working Wisconsinites.
We have to protect Social Security and Medicare for millions of hard-working seniors who deserve the benefits they’ve spent their lives working towards.
We need to defend voting rights and protect access to the ballot box — we’ve seen the harmful impacts of right-wing extremists who try to deny election results and take away Americans’ right to safely and securely participate in elections.
And we need to re-establish protections for abortion access. After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, I was devastated and angry, and I’m sure you were too. Wisconsin just took a huge first step in the right direction with our Supreme Court race last week, but we still have a long way to go toward making sure every woman has the freedom to make her own decisions no matter what zip code she lives in.
I remain hopeful that we can do all of this — and more — together. But it won’t be easy, especially if Republicans have it their way. Their views are becoming more out-of-touch and dangerous by the day, and I know for sure that they will come after my Senate seat with everything they’ve got. They’re already spending big on misleading ads attacking my record.
**But with you by my side, I know we can win. We’ve done it before, together, and I wouldn’t want to have it any other way this time around.**
[**Will you stand by me again and split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Robert Garcia’s? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me from the start.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204279/402667751/-1782790818?refcode2=94dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230423-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRhZTk0NC1mOGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNJIjRBZbpUcB2r0Iottk3K82Oeyl0RZr5EluaC3Yf0=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62204280/402667758/-1782790818?refcode2=94dae944-f8e1-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230423-1-t1a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRhZTk0NC1mOGUxLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNJIjRBZbpUcB2r0Iottk3K82Oeyl0RZr5EluaC3Yf0=)**
Thank you so much, folks. I promise I’ll keep you updated on every step of this journey. So excited for what’s in store for us.
I’m so glad to have you on this historic team.
Let’s do this.
— Tammy

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
---
Robert Garcia for Congress
65 Pine Ave
#348
Long Beach, CA 90802
United States This email was sent to . There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5d96bb43eb842b7bce1667f1d9757f5&_e=ZRZjNlhrwLJf_irN7brh4PEHcdsyMjcni4hM96QgDrYwaWQwbtl_vqz5Sp3oR6IgJsp7Z9v3J_0cEPu-FoWgnrx412sz_YNOWdr56aBDWNg8f8o6_mofvA3OXHfVN2GoWX8mNvBBk1U3kZ-apgfydjBRZp0egi1ZKdl54UknkxCROkp6jqZtvkT6eQvV6ZLhKvoGxHITSd8z2l1Sl_mrR5o_7g0J1UHlHiYfPFVyEWxdTsZ6tMtwJomR_bJiJIb3mNGOOeNu6wCn1Im1ejIfVg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. body:
Sorry for emailing again, friend, but this is urgent:
---
**The GOP is hellbent on destroying any and all social programs – including the biggest of them all, Social Security, which serves over 67 MILLION Americans every month. **

Team, The Supreme Court ruled on Friday that women nationwide can continue to have full access to prescription abortion medication. Michael recently joined 240 of his colleagues in signing an amicus brief pushing to reverse the Texas ruling that banned prescriptions like Mifepristone. SCOTUS' ruling is a big win, for now. Our work isn't over yet. Here are three other ways Michael has been working recently to restore reproductive rights nationwide: 1\. Michael took to the Senate Floor last week to fight back against Republican efforts to further limit abortion access for veterans — even in the case of rape, incest, and when the mother's life is at risk; 2\. He helped introduce the _Equal Access to Abortion Coverage in Health Insurance _(EACH) _Act_ , a bill that would guarantee abortion coverage without restrictions for those who rely on Medicaid and other federal health plans; 3\. And he's been hard at work electing pro-choice candidates in Colorado and across the country. **Michael believes that the decision whether or not to have an abortion is between a patient and their doctor. **His Republican colleagues have made it clear that they want a federal law to ban abortion nationwide — including right here in Colorado. [**Will you rush $10 and help Michael as he continues his work to protect women's access to health care across the country? name: Katie Porter
subject: Who is in charge of Democrats’ messaging?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21709%2E3422442%2E4aoDoh)
Derek,
I get asked all of the time: _who is in charge of Democrats’ messaging and why isn't it better?_
Sadly, I don’t have a satisfactory answer to that first part, our messaging comes from all sorts of different entities. But I can tell you how I’ve won three competitive races in purple Orange County and how I approach messaging.
I’ve both run for office and governed on the principle that we need to stand up to special interests and lower costs for working people. **Whether you’re a Democrat, Republican, or independent—nobody wants to be cheated, scammed, or price-gouged by big corporations, and so it’s a message that’s connected with all sorts of voters.**
Before the 2022 election, some Democrats suggested we “don’t talk about inflation because we don’t have a good message on it.” That’s BS. My own approach was to take the issue head on. **To not just acknowledge that inflation sucks, but to also introduce a bill that would have made oil companies’ price-gouging illegal.**
Democrats are sometimes scared to talk about our own policies for fear of turning off swing-voters. **But my own election is proof that a progressive can win in a purple area.** I’ve been straight with voters about why I support things like climate change policy or Medicare for All. And I’ve explained to voters why those policies would be beneficial to our community here in Orange County.
For me, getting to _learn_ from Americans about what’s working and what isn’t, and getting to _teach_ them how policies we create in Washington can help is one of the best parts of the job. It’s one of the reasons I’m running for the Senate, at the top of the ticket I would be able to help Democrats flip key House seats in California.
Getting our message out takes serious resources, and that’s why I’m asking for your help. [**Can you make a contribution today to help us reach key voters?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230423-1?refcode=EMAG23_1_MES_20230423_V1_F&refcode2=21709_3422442_4aoDoh&akid=21709%2E3422442%2E4aoDoh)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230423-1?refcode=EMAG23_1_MES_20230423_V1_F&refcode2=21709_3422442_4aoDoh&akid=21709%2E3422442%2E4aoDoh)**
–Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG23_1_MES_20230423_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21709_3422442_4aoDoh&akid=21709%2E3422442%2E4aoDoh)**

clean_body: Derek, I get asked all of the time: who is in charge of Democrats’ messaging and why isn't it better? Sadly, I don’t have a satisfactory answer to that first part, our messaging comes from all sorts of different entities. But I can tell you how I’ve won three competitive races in purple Orange County and how I approach messaging. I’ve both run for office and governed on the principle that we need to stand up to special interests and lower costs for working people. Whether you’re a Democrat, Republican, or independent—nobody wants to be cheated, scammed, or price-gouged by big corporations, and so it’s a message that’s connected with all sorts of voters. # Weekly Newsletter
---
| April 23rd, 2023 | Issue LIV
---
---
| | |
# Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Joins Farmers
# And Law Enforcement To Condemn Attempted Livestock Thefts
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MGDTBU5swhDIUqCKyRvkyZR_GepAtZU0MUit7YmPrEftOz_8AeArhZ5Uznb65L6Gyp9VO2eiSm9bv_xxYAApu-y55zlyaRoGggjPCLLH8PGV_iSGOE91oPDDiKDw2WnUYyZi_n_omy5lKkpv0NkBv10mHgVVDmehd96M7IgrkPrGCnE6M9iCs0sTBe_5PtYTV8MS6CN0uxbPqskkheDqsMPoNytdNPRmBHExQgASQAbKfPkt3TaCiJaoHqZefoKc2G0wmzxxXu-VnALMZOayNA==&c=5aS5GwMi5J89Plt31XAnsu_V4Z35slAQduDiD6ysUba59WbZhsscFw==&ch=CT8kr9He44QhpTFvwe4u6ISVWl0ybVlllFOClYpwNO3M-sLgZKM0bQ==)
---
Newfane, NY - Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Senator George Borrello today joined Niagara County Sheriff Michael Filicetti and a local farmer to condemn recent efforts by a so-called "animal rescue" group to steal livestock from local farmers.
Law enforcement officials were [recently made aware](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MGDTBU5swhDIUqCKyRvkyZR_GepAtZU0MUit7YmPrEftOz_8AeArhZ5Uznb65L6GplPYrxX-hYe8YsLLocFwggEBGkViehYzADKPNwf7rsXq9aRCvY0lH-d_TzKiEFRjOYwMml5XSqR1hJ7NxXSVAK6tl7CLr-OFOOQ8Sgw-LDNAB1jK26MiGY1LqsZD_n2CiyWTj_jXHE6lffLHGLYbpGMPFU1EiRAJidnyDUN8RT_1FeLagcXDLHgvR3eYKcpmD5NhdeVVbRPvlJ2iygUkMw1B5f8roIXIrrWvadl_6LFh1GmiiXZTwkMoFewSyvkVUwJR5I4PEv4=&c=5aS5GwMi5J89Plt31XAnsu_V4Z35slAQduDiD6ysUba59WbZhsscFw==&ch=CT8kr9He44QhpTFvwe4u6ISVWl0ybVlllFOClYpwNO3M-sLgZKM0bQ==) of a meeting by a group of radical advocates to actively recruit individuals to steal livestock from local farmers. According to reports, the meeting included how to research locations, how to steal the animals, and tips to help them win in court if caught and convicted.
Senator Ortt announced plans to introduce legislation to amend the law related to burglary in the second degree to include unlawfully entering or remaining on farmland with intent to commit a crime. This would target those who enter farmland to steal livestock and create severe penalties for stealing such livestock.
"Let's be clear - these are not 'advocates', these are extremists who believe they have a right to steal from our hard working local farmers. These extremists are threatening our farmers' property and their livelihoods. Our farmers have every right to protect their families, their businesses, and their property. These groups are nothing more than criminals, and I stand with our local farmers and urge them to immediately report any suspicious activity. I want to thank our local law enforcement for their quick response and ongoing investigations," said Senator Ortt.
---

# Gotham Gazette \- Major Climate and Energy Policies Being Decided in Albany State Budget Negotiations

"No one can tell us how much [the CLCPA] will cost," said Senator Rob Ortt, the Republican minority leader, pointing to the governor's own attempt at revising the law as evidence that even Democrats believe it is flawed.

Ortt - who dubbed the governor's major climate idea the "cap-and-tax" proposal - argued that Democrats have turned to taxing job-creating businesses to fund the state's climate goals instead of the politically unpopular decision to tax consumers. "It's going to drive these companies out of New York," he said.
But his biggest objection was that the rush to move away from fossil fuels will leave the state with an unreliable energy grid. "My argument is the State of New York should be working on a diversified energy portfolio," he said. Without a mix of energy sources including fossil fuels and renewable energy, he said the state would suffer more power outages at crucial moments that can affect health and safety such as during the major snowstorm in Buffalo in December.

"Even if you think this is the most important thing facing the country and the state, there's got to be a smart way to do this. It might be a slower way, it might be less coercive, and that's probably the better way," said Ortt.

This year, we have hard-working candidates all over Indiana who are knocking doors, putting up yard signs, and doing the legwork to make sure that more Hoosiers will have public servants who will fight for their best interests. Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuM8w3vwlxEdcgzNSxspPigHsU-5ixjyAodJs4BcdKdF4hab1JtQ9LMFechff5Exg8_aZ4dhpEG1bdn7EfA4ELq25j1vHPKby2A4MRNxsxZUA_H6U_rzcuSIf72VwxIIPz5Rv1X5cgzkw3UrnLQcVy9nXmDkhZuMs2KYNLPbfsz3wg%3D%3D)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuN5nCkQyyxUNx344SGaAG1ZP31zBMh2cm-LMQl40ctlHSUcXBIJVYub60nHegoOiTqMoD7NvDWWkJ7L5nKmVKFvjqwtMK8mYKz7v7TtJlGV06Q8Kdpyqq3horg696sWsxJdTXbMGPFP2tpAHJ9Vi4hgpMQEGUYD3HSksu8UYPT2HA%3D%3D)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuN_DjrKQYYsZbyCzju9I2zwYu5a5OYtFj3axJjn1RnOSZXQwaAO3Nlp-2MGruMVOpEZOn9GhySvuqprGnsaGsLW5T4kFiWD6-EUsOcL4qtwIFDnqV15BILQ7zUWEkUwbO64t8A4RrmopgcosE_x71Djg9hi8YaDctr5h0wFgblrnA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuNczbeclR9SH-7Uxwxbi5hJQOi67Y-U6OBN522z9nSZiUK5Ys04dIiefxqVB_r-0AvX_g-t3jY9tHQrqia3mjrKtSq0GUcJExXLBMoX9OAaPLdF2S5uG6VTEuO8zEvVJmr4cTHrru_cYjdG-7tjJYAbff-oeHUlmGAP5gG76Dp8Dw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. **[Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuNC_srbXbo2EAO-x2Q_ik8WMuL3y8y6yzhu_yW1gODagp1Eu2Y-2-CtpamUIBsDP8iWDd3zOBHTbN9jUgKUVgmKois1HsyyoqnqJCcdGm9LRIQFsriMa_Zul9lTuswW__DHjRgAsaDtjMEpJIp31peUKz426aR-Zd6ec2P54FMVXQ%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d9e5c2bc4104bc488a70822825a9bb7&_e=GbNsztomtTjcvb75nJUT4GDpK1hwTejUuf3UepefIg6fesk5BnBm3EzfsxPCWv4ZXXXJE05fxVmEpB61Hc0ezEVoGxfCyWnw8fUSIdu87lrja4IfWVSuIi0D1MxnPAxT6thD0icruizBjC9ZADanYQ5XHsX5hyMJaesCB48LWstTvPZ3DnW3ZtGFiZ-zk3nnpyHJpydSYBM9BxlA9KFQgFGfj-v90XKkEWryU1JAzuNpcM2JhNbTJg7CpmkBkVOgKVSDfPaNaZq6UGo5Q1nYiUCbh3GHUgOL-qCdai-gOhMLpwLA37i45AFt-M6y0gUKya10vccv0OtKCxbh3P1HNJJtj8O8YrHc8tEKCA8uAElrRgmVLMwQrdOeXsvgaexcXRITpkDmQaMRadKAy7yGiQ%3D%3D)

---

name: Team DNC
subject: [WATCH] We want to make sure you’ve seen this clip from the 1996 Democratic National Convention 💃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party, but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. | |
---
Derek, do you remember the last time the Democratic National Convention was hosted in Chicago? The year was 1996. The first Nintendo 64 gaming console had just been released. _ER, Friends,_ and _Seinfeld_ topped the TV ratings. And the hit song of the summer -- and the convention -- was Los del Rio’s “Macarena.” It didn’t take long for politicians, delegates, attendees, and volunteers alike to break out in song and dance. **Don’t believe us? clean_body: We might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party, but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. | | Derek, do you remember the last time the Democratic National Convention was hosted in Chicago? The year was 1996. The first Nintendo 64 gaming console had just been released. ER, Friends, and Seinfeld topped the TV ratings. And the hit song of the summer -- and the convention -- was Los del Rio’s “Macarena.” It didn’t take long for politicians, delegates, attendees, and volunteers alike to break out in song and dance. Don’t believe us? Just take a look: Now, we might not be able to guarantee another Macarena dance party...but when you donate to the DNC today, we can promise that you’ll be automatically entered to win a trip for you (and a friend!) to witness the 2024 Democratic National Convention firsthand. Democratic National Conventions are not just about politics, but are also moments of joy and celebration. They’re powerful demonstrations of the strength and unity of our party, and we couldn’t be more excited to invite you to join us, Derek. Don’t wait, Derek -- this is an opportunity you won’t want to miss! The Democrats Contributions to the DNC will be spent on DNC activities and programs as the DNC determines within its sole discretion and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate or purpose. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. This promotion begins on April 11, 2023 at 12:01 a.m. ET. Entries must be received by August 11, 2024 at 6 PM ET. Enter by or to enter without contributing. One winner and a guest will receive the following prize package: Travel, hotel stay, and two (2) tickets to attend the 2024 Democratic National Convention in Chicago, Illinois (approx. retail value $4,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are natural persons, legal residents of the fifty (50) United States, District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico, and who are 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules By entering, each entrant accepts and agrees to be bound by the official rules. Failure to comply with the official rules may result in disqualification. I won’t let him win.

| **It’s official: Extremist Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson (R) has entered the race for Governor of North Carolina.**

I won’t stand for an extremist who will drag North Carolina backward to become our Governor. Peter, I'm ready to fight back with everything I’ve got — but I need you with me.

[_**Split a contribution between our campaign and Valerie Foushee to help defeat Mark Robinson>>> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62206548/402675700/-728492742?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230423-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDQ4NjJhNi0wMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpEQnpRsfCb_eSI6dFeboSma-JGZA0oEi76M3cS-mJY=)

* * *
Peter, you and I believe that building a brighter future is possible for North Carolina – one that is rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for all.

_My opponent would do the exact opposite._

Peter, extremists like Mark Robinson want to tell people who they can marry, when women must be pregnant, and which people we should hate. He and his radical accomplices are the greatest threat to the brighter future we seek. Frankly, Robinson is wrong for North Carolina.

**Our race for Governor of North Carolina will be the most important and most expensive in the country in 2024, and right now, it’s way too close for comfort.[_I’m asking committed Democrats everywhere to step up and help defeat Mark Robinson and the North Carolina GOP. Click here to split a donation between me and Valerie Foushee to power our fight >> _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62206555/402675713/-728492742?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230423-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDQ4NjJhNi0wMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpEQnpRsfCb_eSI6dFeboSma-JGZA0oEi76M3cS-mJY=)**

The most important thing we can do for the future of democracy everywhere is to prevent extremist, anti-democracy radicals from gaining power — but Robinson and his GOP allies have spent years preparing for this campaign. We cannot allow him to become Governor.

I know you share my priorities for North Carolina and our nation, Peter. If we are going to protect our fundamental rights, secure our democracy, and ensure the dignity of ALL people, we need to stand together and win this CRITICAL race.

name: Supreme Court Update
subject: ALERT: Justice Sonia Sotomayor SPEAKS OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT: Justice Sotomayor speaks out about the Supreme Court's far-right rulings**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:**
[**Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to show you support reproductive rights! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)
---

Team -- Like so many of us, Justice Sonia Sotomayor says she was shocked and saddened when the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe v. Wade._

**But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

**[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms at this critical moment in American history >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)**

_**Goal: 250,000 signatures needed!**_

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230423-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=10531%2E9716520%2EpBhxqP)

Team DSCC

subject: SAY IT WITH US: Banning abortion is a LOSING position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207661/402679289/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=&emci=0878c882-91e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e273fd42-05e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team: After the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ this past summer, anti-choice extremists all across the country thought this would be their chance to enact bans on abortion — _and many have. _ BUT, any time voters have had a say in a decision that could impact their reproductive freedom, they've proven **banning abortion is a losing decision. ** [**We must keep up the momentum and continue to secure permanent reproductive freedom alongside voters everywhere possible. Will you rush a donation today to help us launch more ballot measure campaigns in 2023 and 2024 to protect abortion _for good?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207662/402679290/-721321771?refcode=E21018-20230423-Mifepristone-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=) [RUSH A DONATION →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207663/402679291/-721321771?refcode=E21018-20230423-Mifepristone-SB-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=) Every single state where abortion was on the ballot last year, voters decisively acted to protect abortion and reproductive health care in their home states. _Not just historically liberal states like California_ — **in purple and red states including Kentucky, Kansas, Montana, Michigan and Vermont, Americans voted to safeguard their permanent access to abortion. ** _And just earlier this month in Wisconsin_, voters elected the candidate who would flip the court to have a pro-choice majority at a time when a critically-important abortion case is coming to the state’s Supreme Court later this year. 80% of Americans want to see abortion access protected, but an extremist few are working in direct opposition to what voters want. So, we’ll keep fighting at the ballot to protect reproductive freedom, end abortion bans, and win the progress working people in America need. **Ten states remain where abortion access could be permanently protected via ballot measure.[And you can bet we’re fueling up for the cycle ahead — will you rush a donation today to help us launch more ballot measure campaigns in 2023 and 2024 to protect abortion _for good?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207664/402679292/-721321771?refcode=E21018-20230423-Mifepristone-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207665/402679293/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E21018-20230423-Mifepristone-EL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62207666/402679294/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E21018-20230423-Mifepristone-EL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjczZmQ0Mi0wNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Vrv6S0HIHl1PYxZLOmcN45bpk9xOEotXq2LEw2HXNA=)**

clean_body: | | Team: After the fall of Roe v. Wade this past summer, anti-choice extremists all across the country thought this would be their chance to enact bans on abortion — and many have. BUT, any time voters have had a say in a decision that could impact their reproductive freedom, they've proven banning abortion is a losing decision. = = Every single state where abortion was on the ballot last year, voters decisively acted to protect abortion and reproductive health care in their home states. Not just historically liberal states like California — in purple and red states including Kentucky, Kansas, Montana, Michigan and Vermont, Americans voted to safeguard their permanent access to abortion. And just earlier this month in Wisconsin, voters elected the candidate who would flip the court to have a pro-choice majority at a time when a critically-important abortion case is coming to the state’s Supreme Court later this year. 80% of Americans want to see abortion access protected, but an extremist few are working in direct opposition to what voters want. So, we’ll keep fighting at the ballot to protect reproductive freedom, end abortion bans, and win the progress working people in America need. Ten states remain where abortion access could be permanently protected via ballot measure.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your help, team. Peter, 1 in 8 Americans has been a victim of nonconsensual pornography. **One. in. Eight. ** That’s a horrific statistic — but what makes it worse is that when a victim’s photos or videos are circulated online without their consent,_. _ **Right now, revenge porn is not a federal crime in the United States. ** The _SHIELD Act_ could change all that, and it was just recently reintroduced in the Senate. Now is the time to push Congress to act, and secure justice for those 1 in 8 Americans. [_**Will you add your name now to our petition demanding Congress pass the _SHIELD Act_ immediately? | Peter,

I’m running for Congress in AZ-01, but this campaign isn’t about me – it’s about our community.

Just like so many of you, I believe there are a lot of things we need to work on here in Arizona. From affordable healthcare to the quality of our public schools, we need to make sure all aspects of our day-to-day lives are being improved by lawmakers in Congress.

[_**So, I want to know what issues you’re most concerned about. Will you please take a moment to fill out our Campaign Priorities Survey?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62207882/402679656/-308880247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2ZlZWYzNzQtMDdlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pPW52jT3SfSipxdZpYMyoIKKULmmY6qs2pgf9AV1OYI=&emci=cceef374-07e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cfeef374-07e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10327913)

Dear Friends,

We have several events coming up, including a Meet & Greet this Thursday, and many ways to get involved with our campaign.

Next week, we have a candidates' forum and an event for the National Day of Prayer. Please take a look at the events lists below.

And come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

While Republican leaders wheel and deal with their dark money donors, my campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you who chip in $5, $10, or $25 at a time. That’s how we’ve kept this swing district blue since 2018.
But this race will be our toughest yet – Republican mega-donors are fired up after coming within just a few points of flipping this seat.
**It’s up to us to keep up with their spending in this race, dollar for dollar. If we’re outspent, we’ll be drowned out on the airwaves, out-organized across the district, and won’t be able to effectively respond to misleading attacks.**
[**It’s time to up the ante in our fight to keep NV-03 blue. Can I count on you to chip in $15 to show the GOP that we have no intention of folding to their high rollers?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62208027/402680430/-2112663142?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230423_FR_HighRollers_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNhMjIwOC0wOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blJXzqQF2F0LaWqFLKKC8ZBknkb2kgTDR9vvgMXbU10=)

They’ve spent $20 million attacking me, proving that they’re willing to bet the farm to put NV-03 in their column. = | | | = | | = While Republican leaders wheel and deal with their dark money donors, my campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you who chip in $5, $10, or $25 at a time. That’s how we’ve kept this swing district blue since 2018. But this race will be our toughest yet – Republican mega-donors are fired up after coming within just a few points of flipping this seat. It’s up to us to keep up with their spending in this race, dollar for dollar. Peter,

I know you’ve received a lot of messages from my campaign team recently about how important our early campaign work is to winning another election. _**I wanted to reach out personally to put that sentiment in context.**_

For competitive races like ours, we have to defend against intense outside pressure and investment. National Republican groups want to flip VA-07 **red** badly, and they’re willing to pour millions into our district to do it.

Their investment leads to countless attack ads online, on TV, and on billboards. They’ll mobilize their field forces to campaign against me and the good work I’ve done in Congress. And they’ll recruit prominent national figures – just like Ted Cruz last cycle – to visit Virginia to support my eventual opponent.

All this means we have a challenging road ahead, but one that I know will again lead to victory because of the community we have behind this campaign. _**So, why does early investment matter?**_

It allows us to scale up our campaign team early and build a strong foundation for success. We can purchase campaign materials like yard signs and literature to get the word out about my candidacy, and we can defend my track record and stand up to Republican attack ads.

clean_body: This was the most expensive House race in Pennsylvania in 2022, and Republicans are already preparing to spend even more this time around in their efforts to defeat me. | = | Peter, I’m sorry to email on a Sunday, but Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day if I’m going to defend my toss-up seat in Congress. This was the most expensive House race in Pennsylvania in 2022, and Republicans are already preparing to spend even more this time around in their efforts to defeat me – especially because they know flipping this seat red is their only chance to hold on to their razor-thin House majority. = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=206%2E35263%2ESW4YZz ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — If you knew starting a monthly recurring donation could

Tammy’s courage to stand tall and move our country forward has the GOP
watching our campaign closely, and she’s already become a top target as
they look for opportunities to retake control of the Senate.

Since Tammy officially launched her reelection campaign, our team has been
building out our strategy for the months ahead — and that includes nailing
down a budget that allows us to fight back against the right-wing attacks
we know will come our way.

Knowing we can count on your contribution each month helps us ensure that
our campaign can break through the noise, share Tammy’s message, and reach
voters year-round — not just a month or two before Election Day. And in a
race as competitive and expensive as this one will be, that work makes all
the difference.

clean_body: I won’t let him win. | | | It’s official: Extremist Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson (R) has entered the race for Governor of North Carolina. I won’t stand for an extremist who will drag North Carolina backward to become our Governor. Peter, I’m ready to fight back with everything I’ve got — but I need you with me. Peter, you and I believe that building a brighter future is possible for North Carolina – one that is rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for all. My opponent would do the exact opposite. Peter, extremists like Mark Robinson want to tell people who they can marry, when women must be pregnant, and which people we should hate. He and his radical accomplices are the greatest threat to the brighter future we seek. Frankly, Robinson is wrong for North Carolina. The most important thing we can do for the future of democracy everywhere is to prevent extremist, anti-democracy radicals from gaining power — but Robinson and his GOP allies have spent years preparing for this campaign. We cannot allow him to become Governor. I know you share my priorities for North Carolina and our nation, Peter. If we are going to protect our fundamental rights, secure our democracy, and ensure the dignity of ALL people, we need to stand together and win this CRITICAL race. _ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Together, Josh United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

〰️Friend,

Republicans across the country are hard at work fighting the Radical Left. While conservatives won Majority in the House of Representatives, Democrats still control the Senate, which means we have to fight harder, and smarter, than ever before to ensure our freedoms remain intact.

**We 're focused on supporting Republicans so they can implement common-sense, conservative policies, protect the Constitution, and keep the government OUT of our homes. So much is being impacted by the progressives in Congress, and the American people are suffering because of it. **

Our economy is facing a recession as prices rise more everyday. **Since when does a carton of eggs cost $12?**

Our Southern Border is open for anyone and everyone to cross, only to be awarded **welfare benefits, and in some states, voting rights and a driver's license.**

Our communities are facing higher and higher rates of crime, with **carjackings, random assault,** and **robberies** increasing in urban and rural areas.

We can do better than this.

**[Can you make a donation today to help us support Republicans across the country in their efforts to better the state of our Union? Whether it's $5, $25, or $75, any amount will make a sincere difference.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=8ed7ddbda45f413989921a46f0183074&_e=FjcKSXjtxx7FLWNnSECiGqv0LKMkh08cyw2sXmze-J4v4dDGDCv0G6VafLM1gtDsQCQMyiiQ35ccW5YO3lLZ_5rXWECBHGUrUyn7kAJeTY2ap4WKErABw5x64lFH8fH8fI7nBdS9O7yHJTgj08p2wHKrsEZQnHqB-h45JOmPZVTEkIg6MsAAnBDMZCAEUWzN1gJrj6_wH2LnV5CeeWRU_BN-ZVuB51Bb9_N-pFRdw6bsT9lXlvYfQTrzeR5iYBODekj90V9CN23a-CI4kJCbRqdyDaZSSSyBztetEUgTUjYibx3zqicHbPtcKtpkomiBPSSl3_steKyoSBEJUv434X6JpsytTFHMOhLG1j0cd53S5Iazg8rCpGqKAO2FgUjjzFm0M2O_YpHfKzZpqtCinkqJUWnNrHArnfevMoNXPdK7cbnupNLRbIncZIC6r1h3MfZ0_BwDsTR4B6RGT0ZopwDZN8T3UiM4qVzgAxPAQ8PKAqr0KNuVZPHC5-RkHP9hYLGDoSZOCD5fEi3Uhz7Z1j6H2P4pJ513jrOqNDvAz-k%3D)**

If you're able, please send your support today. We have a major fight ahead of us in 2024, and it's only the beginning.

Thank you,

_Republicans Fighting For Conservative Change_

_**Republicans Fighting For Conservative Change** is dedicated to supporting the election of Common Sense, Conservative candidates for office.

We are focused working with these candidates once elected to follow through on their promises and create real change with conservative policies to preserve our country, our freedoms, and our Constitution._

clean_body: Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Here is your opportunity to sign up today for FREE. | | | | | | Dear Reader, Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is ACTUALLY important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a FREE newsletter called where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to . In today’s world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. At , we eliminate the bias and just deliver the facts of today’s news and allowing you to reach your own conclusion. Get delivered to your inbox every weekday so you do not miss out on anything. Our team summarizes every story in a couple sentences or less and offers you a link to the full story so you can read deeper on what matters to you. covers a wide array of topics, so you stay informed on what is important. Politics, sports, market watch, scientific advancements, etc. we cover it all, so you stay informed. Join The Flyover today to cruise the news and just land the facts. % The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | -

body:
Tell Congress to lower the cost of prescription drugs

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62211038/402686525/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk2YmVhMS0xMWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5bb_dZFKXeDSYFnTDGbINw6ewXtjzMB1H6vdoOmRR8=&emci=e1e4d79a-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1796bea1-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Democrats' Inflation Reduction Act is hard at work Derek, capping the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare to just $35 a month. **As the father of a daughter with diabetes, Mark Warner has been working for years to lower the cost of insulin. But once he helped get this first step across the finish line for seniors, he kept up the pressure on the pharmaceutical companies. Then three of the leading insulin producers in the United States followed suit and agreed to cap the price of insulin for all patients.** Now that Democrats have secured this important victory, we can't stop here. Not when so many prescription drugs Americans rely on remain outrageously expensive. So now Mark is working to lower the cost of life-saving prescription drugs for all Americans. ****[Will you sign our petition to join Senator Warner in urging Congress to lower the cost of prescription drugs for all Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62211039/402686526/1351364081?refcode=mw_em_230423_1_b&ms=mw_em_230423_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk2YmVhMS0xMWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5bb_dZFKXeDSYFnTDGbINw6ewXtjzMB1H6vdoOmRR8=&emci=e1e4d79a-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1796bea1-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**** The truth is, our current system often forces Americans to make heartbreaking decisions like deciding between putting food on the table for their families or purchasing critical prescription drugs. This shouldn't be happening in the richest country in the world. No American should have to make this kind of sacrifice to afford their essential medications. [_**If you agree, sign Senator Warner's petition right now to call on Congress to take action to lower the cost of prescription drugs.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62211041/402686527/1351364081?refcode=mw_em_230423_1_b&ms=mw_em_230423_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk2YmVhMS0xMWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5bb_dZFKXeDSYFnTDGbINw6ewXtjzMB1H6vdoOmRR8=&emci=e1e4d79a-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1796bea1-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237) Thank you, Team Warner ********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62211042/402686528/1351364081?refcode=mw_em_230423_1_b&ms=mw_em_230423_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk2YmVhMS0xMWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5bb_dZFKXeDSYFnTDGbINw6ewXtjzMB1H6vdoOmRR8=&emci=e1e4d79a-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1796bea1-11e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)********

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Hope > Fear
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must work together to push back on the gun lobby’s dangerous narrative
#

Hi there, we hope you’re having a relaxing Sunday.
We don’t want to take up too much of your time today, [**but we’re humbly asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC if you’re able to.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=1&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)
Here’s why:
Gun violence is on the rise. Just in the past week, we watched in horror as three young people were shot for making honest mistakes: Ralph Yarl for ringing the wrong doorbell, Kaylin Gills for going up the wrong driveway, and Payton Washington after her friend got in the wrong car.
These shootings are all part of the larger narrative of fear being perpetuated by the gun lobby. The gun lobby tells their supporters that everyone is the enemy, and that you should always be on the offensive.
And this school of thought is killing people.
It’s up to us to push back on this fear mongering and stop more senseless acts of violence. While the gun lobby may focus on fear, we focus on hope here at GIFFORDS.
That’s because we know that with commonsense gun safety legislation there can be a better future for our nation, where our communities and children are safe from gun violence.
[**So please, if you can, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today so we can stand up to the gun lobby and continue our work to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=2&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7BzXPA&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=21&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr23.Phu1VU&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=22&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr23.6sNEa3&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=23&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr23.OKouW1&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=24&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7su2Eh&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=25&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr23.kgvFSZ&refcode=em230423-1-15&t=26&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm)**
---
****
Thank you,
The GIFFORDS Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5314%2E3935704%2EGgiBGm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: We must work together to push back on the gun lobby’s dangerous narrative Hi there, we hope you’re having a relaxing Sunday. We don’t want to take up too much of your time today, Here’s why: Gun violence is on the rise. Just in the past week, we watched in horror as three young people were shot for making honest mistakes: Ralph Yarl for ringing the wrong doorbell, Kaylin Gills for going up the wrong driveway, and Payton Washington after her friend got in the wrong car. These shootings are all part of the larger narrative of fear being perpetuated by the gun lobby. The gun lobby tells their supporters that everyone is the enemy, and that you should always be on the offensive. And this school of thought is killing people. It’s up to us to push back on this fear mongering and stop more senseless acts of violence. While the gun lobby may focus on fear, we focus on hope here at GIFFORDS. That’s because we know that with commonsense gun safety legislation there can be a better future for our nation, where our communities and children are safe from gun violence. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The GIFFORDS Team Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

clean_body: | | Friend, Tucker Carlson just called attention to the MASSIVE revelation that the Biden campaign organized the letter of 51 former intelligence officers who LIED about the Hunter Biden laptop being “Russian disinformation.” “...it was a lie that came from Joe Biden and Secretary of State Tony Blinken. That was election interference.” -Tucker Carlson Joe Biden stood on that debate stage with me and LIED to every single American citizen when he told the nation that his son’s laptop depicting all of his many crimes was fabricated by the Russians. This is the Democrats’ 2024 playbook. They will LIE about the border, they will LIE about inflation, they will LIE about our national security, and they will LIE about crime. And they’ll collude with their Deep State “ex-CIA” operatives to cook up any report they need to back up their lies. This is un-American. These are Soviet tactics. But what else can you expect from a party that just tried to imprison its leading opponent? 2024 is no longer just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic. We either win – or we lose America for good. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sat, April 22, 2023 Subject: FORMER CIA OFFICIAL TESTIFIES... To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | “Biden campaign, Blinken orchestrated intel letter to discredit Hunter Biden laptop story, ex-CIA official says” [SOURCE: FOX NEWS] Friend, Former CIA Deputy Director Michael Morrell testified under oath that the Biden campaign asked him to lead the effort to cover up the Hunter Biden Laptop from Hell. Morrell organized 50 other former intelligence agents and spies to sign a letter FALSELY claiming that the Hunter Biden laptop was “Russian disinformation.” They knew it was a lie. But they didn’t care. Morrell said he wanted to “help Vice President Biden... because [he] wanted him to win the election.” Friend, these are the kinds of dirty tactics we’re going up against in the 2024 election. They will say and do ANYTHING and abandon any sense of honor to try and stop us. In fact, we’ve already gotten a preview of what’s to come... I’ve been arrested. I’ve been threatened with a possible 136 YEARS in prison. My own home has been raided. ...And we’re still not even in 2024 yet. The Left doesn’t want YOU to have a voice in your own country, so they’re going to resort to the most despicable tactics straight out of the Soviet playbook to try and beat us. But we cannot let them win. Because this isn’t just an election. 2024 will decide whether America is still a Free Republic where YOUR vote decides YOUR future. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | | | | Peter, [**We must stop the Republicans from ripping the state house away from Democrats in Pennsylvania!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te070bbf2-43f6-4d45-93fd-fc269d2ac853/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _One of the biggest victories on election night, 2022, was in Pennsylvania. We elected a Democratic Governor, Josh Shapiro, over seditionist Doug Mastriano, and Senator John Fetterman over right-wing Mehmet Oz._ **_And, in an incredible highlight of the night, we unexpectedly took back the state house by a 101-100 margin!_** **_It created opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better, and those in surrounding states and across the country. As we know, guns sold illicitly and climate-change-causing carbon don't know what state lines mean._** _**So, on May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!**_ _Democrat Heather Boyd (District 163) is clear after the travesty of Dobbs, "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is the main reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn (District 108) says he'll stop permitless carry to protect our schoolchildren. Both GOP opponents, meanwhile, are ready to give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. And they're terrible on EVERY other issue._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn so we keep progressing in Pennsylvania and across the country, and never return to MAGA Republican policies of pre-2020?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf40dd818-78c7-48be-a087-19ce9888de4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Team Wiley
subject: The stakes for 2024 are clear.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro]Peter, My name is Mariah, and I am Wiley’s Finance Director. I am thrilled to have you on board as we kick off Wiley’s 2024 re-election campaign. Wiley has officially been added to the DCCC’s Frontline Candidate list, which means grassroots donations from supporters like you make an even bigger difference. Wiley defeated Bo Hines in 2022 and flipped this seat because he had a strong coalition behind him each step of the way. We need everyone on our team to step up once again this year and help us re-elect Wiley and protect this seat. I’d like to be honest with you, Peter. Campaigns across the board are struggling to reach their goals, but from what Wiley and the other team members have told me, our grassroots support is second to none. That said, we need to get a headstart on fundraising this cycle if we want to ensure Wiley continues leading the good fight in Congress. Can you rush in a $10 donation to Wiley’s re-election campaign right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&amount=10] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: RUSH IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=10] RUSH IN $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=25] RUSH IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=50] RUSH IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=100] RUSH IN $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=250] RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro] I’ll be honest: Bo Hines will pull all the stops to unseat Wiley in 2024. We have no time to waste. This will surely be a tough fight, but if everyone on our team does their part, we will re-elect Wiley and continue having the best possible representative fighting for NC-13 in Congress. Can you rush in a donation of any size right now to help us show our strength? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro] I am so happy to be on this team and can’t wait to see all the incredible things we can accomplish together. Thank you, Peter. Mariah Morgan Finance Director Wiley Nickel For Congress http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro] Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215814/402691883/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=) Peter,

**My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement.**

Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.

He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points.

Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022.

[**But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215815/402691884/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215821/402691890/2136661255?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215823/402691892/2136661255?amount=20&amounts=10,15,20&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=)
Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting.** Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.

2. **Primaries.** Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. _By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!_

3. **Marc Molinaro.** Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in _his_ 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. _He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!_

4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads.** Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. _It was completely false, and it was sickening._

5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years.** 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024?

[Split a contribution to support UNITEDemocrats and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it. »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215824/402691893/2136661255?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62215830/402691899/2136661255?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230423_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkYjBkZGNiLTE5ZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l9AeLZYgxr2ngEw4Ogij3cvdehUfRtqCsK5gn-xnj1k=)

Al
