clean_body: | = Peter, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did: 1. Redistricting. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known. 2. Primaries. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole! 3. Marc Molinaro. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene! 4. Crazy GOP Attack Ads. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening. 5. Midterm vs. Presidential Years. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out! So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thanks, Al **P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation.= | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to . Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and beat Republicans who oppose President Biden's agenda and replace them with good Democrats, make a=.** | | = =

name: Adam Schiff
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to share your input with me via our April Issues Survey
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)
I’ve spent the last few weeks on a tour of California — and I’ve enjoyed every minute of it, Derek.
This is what I love to do: meet people from all walks of life, hear their unique concerns and passions, what brings them joy and what they’re worried about. And how we can solve problems together. I work hard to bring people of different views and perspectives together to fight homelessness, to reduce prices, to fight the fentanyl epidemic, and to save our planet.
But the truth is, in a state the size of ours (the largest in the nation!) I’m not going to be able to sit down with every single Californian. **[So I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to share your input with me via our April Issues Survey — I promise it’ll be quick:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230423-issues-survey.HZsVDd&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230423_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230423-issues-survey.HZsVDd&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230423_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)
---
It’s important to me that our campaign reflects your priorities, and hearing directly from you is a key part of that effort. Whether you’re concerned about affordable housing, the future of our democracy, inflation, gun violence, climate change, or threats to reproductive freedom, I hope you’ll take a minute to share how you’re feeling.
Thanks for letting me know what’s on your mind. It means a lot to me.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230423-issues-survey.HZsVDd&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230423_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC30_20230423_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2131%2E5257348%2E-ny1MM)**

Hey Peter,Emily Busch’s son ran for his life on November 30, 2021, when a school shooter at Oxford High School opened fire, killing four children, and wounded seven others. Unfortunately, Oxford was just one of the many horrific incidents in Michigan and across our country lately – including a mass shooting at Michigan State University, in which some survivors of the Oxford School shooting had to **_once again run for their lives._** Our children shouldn’t have to relive trauma and go through not one, but _multiple_ school shootings in their lifetime. This is a uniquely American problem, and we need to solve it. Emily is deeply concerned about gun violence and the safety of our children and now, she wants to know where you stand on this key issue.**_So we want to know, how concerned are you about gun violence?_** [VERY We have to elect leaders to Congress who will fight tooth and nail to keep our children and families safe.Thank you so much for your input on this crucial issue.–Busch for Congress PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Disney Cruise: Hero or Villain?
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737304?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, you might remember the story of an enchanted place called Lighthouse Point located on the island of Eleuthera in the Bahamas. It was a picturesque aquatic wonderland that was almost surreal with its ancient coral reef structures beneath crystal bluish green waters, thriving with brightly colored biodiversity -- _**a symbol of serenity and nature’s miracles.**_ You might also recall that this magical habitat didn’t have a fairy tale ending because **Disney Cruise became the villain in its own story.** The corporate giant carelessly DECIMATED portions of the iconic coral reefs at Lighthouse Point all to construct a **$250 million cruise ship pier!** But Friend, the story of our ocean’s beautiful coral reefs doesn’t have to end in tragedy. We still have a chance to __**SAVE**__ the last of our world’s great coral reefs from being **DESTROYED** by the cruise industry’s corporate greed. **_However, it’s going to take BOLD and immediate action from environmentalists like you._ [Don’t let Big Cruise continue to exploit our oceans for profit. Add your name NOW!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737305?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737306?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Home to some of the planet’s most spectacular marine life -- _**from tropical fish to vibrant underwater plants to unique sea stars and sea urchins**_ \-- coral reefs serve as a vital part of our ecosystems.
In fact, these limestone structures are often referred to as “ __the rainforests of the sea__ ” due to their critical role in maintaining thriving oceans. Without coral reefs, essential food, shelter, and spawning grounds, many of the magnificent marine creatures they support _**would NOT exist.**_
If we continue to allow corporations like Disney Cruise to invade these sensitive habitats with _**massive vessels and toxic pollutants**_ , we could soon lose the remaining coral reefs _**FOREVER.**_
Please, Friend, we need **4,301 more activists** like you to speak up right away to STOP Big Cruise from harming wildlife, our environment, and local communities with their coral reef destruction. [**Can we count on you to DEMAND action from the EPA on protecting our precious coral reefs from corporate polluters?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737307?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737308?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting our oceans and coral reefs,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Katy Frisch
subject: Nate Silver was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.

Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62216694/402695366/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2515-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjOWNhMmUwLTIyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sxVUAqiuFRqY_nOaAf7X8jExRbLJZIulgDC5PfsuNPc=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
**[Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and American Bridge PAC to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62216695/402695367/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2515-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjOWNhMmUwLTIyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sxVUAqiuFRqY_nOaAf7X8jExRbLJZIulgDC5PfsuNPc=)**

clean_body: | | | Hello, In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

But they’re not the only ones to blame, Peter. **The Senate had FIFTY YEARS to codify _Roe_ , and they FAILED.**

Here’s the thing, Peter: **_THERE ARE STILL NO BLACK WOMEN IN THE UNITED STATES SENATE_** — so it’s no secret why our rights are being stripped away with no pushback.

[Black women are our only hope, Peter, and it’s up to ALL OF US to elect them. Will you donate $10 now to help us send progressive Black women like Barbara Lee to the Senate in 2024 and prove once and for all that the GOP has _no_ power over our bodies?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oIhbIZMVsW3afV_eoOUfR_oHzyAF2Ux88HMOq0h3Zb8pJI7uEt-UfY79zbvPajylxecCkbC6yvB4MLMzqsR7jYAtfj_-O8u4dRSQMyYAW0rPVU34c3HGOSvluG9gMxm0VkyGCyRWkvHj2esDbuhwhnUBb8sW5Tx27wK7x5Jcl-qslnWsAqDCkBn5B_AYBpA1HqP-m-KtxOH8YpYybJItASeplq8PYxWYYLAz6EZyvsrEp8TlecsetAdHNHdEGfJF9r9ANRLzBqrJxKypqLVutwGTqsYba6u7PH_vA7NdJ9bvrjys84Ciy47E3vf8OHD8Usgb7huh7iS_xwIQE0-_eb4XKhtcVsVxMxehg3-OB2nhd1R8NpBQSk758eQfL6Hs9QlQWPcdzd8eubu2JMW-GyR_t7iiT3B8WBQb6otndrtFnEDyRWpD_ZD9Cvvu5daLciqDqxMh8ozBUSW_X-mycfw/3vl/1rJOnBiKTBCmGl-Q8YLVtA/h11/lsjIaEXrNeVJWNu01ssp_MgqzFvAk6zGv6qzT9J7s-g)

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | | Last summer, a group of right-wing extremist justices on our nation’s highest court — a court that was designed to protect the fundamental rights and freedoms of ALL Americans — decided that they should have control over who receives reproductive healthcare and who doesn’t and overturned Roe v. Wade. But they’re not the only ones to blame, Peter. The Senate had FIFTY YEARS to codify Roe , and they FAILED. name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Campaign Update April 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHxtDf9mSub0TmRM7b1hn8SWEZiU8OylYJW9rYOn3TniCz-DH7m3XnHygLX_d82nNDQR9Mkl5Dm_dzkV4ygaVYWSmmMO6BEX1fwjZFLbag64pJoP3tdiGAptmXu0nSaqAaomwKZJmoQE6k89GLeyLyr4DYi9K-NBMN6rCSZCPQMu8PbHfJOHG0NB2ty2irOgf0tZw6rK_a5BVrjuPddxUADt8um3jn1XWYnYOorxOKHrnjNMJspS4odNqrmxt2y7TVI2tqbQmcU3aLFPTjOgowNAxD_zXa-Utw==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)
---
|
---
| Just 13 days to the Convention.
---
|
---
| It is difficult to live, work, and raise your family in peace today due to marxist democrat policies. Everything is more expensive, we are less safe, we now have election season instead of election day, we have divisive woke ideologies in our schools, we are tied to California vehicle emissions standards, and much more. The good news is the Youngkin administration is making progress, but we need a Republican State Senate to make real change.
We have been working hard and we are making friends all over Senate District 10. It would be an honor to continue service to you in the Virginia State Senate. Our May 6 Convention is right around the corner. If our convention delegates show up, we will win and then help Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow Republicans un-California Virginia.
We are excited to have received the following most recent endorsements:

* Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHxtDf9mSub0TmRM7b1hn8SWEZiU8OylYJW9rYOn3TniCz-DH7m3XnHygLX_d82nNDQR9Mkl5Dm_dzkV4ygaVYWSmmMO6BEX1fwjZFLbag64pJoP3tdiGAptmXu0nSaqAaomwKZJmoQE6k89GLeyLyr4DYi9K-NBMN6rCSZCPQMu8PbHfJOHG0NB2ty2irOgf0tZw6rK_a5BVrjuPddxUADt8um3jn1XWYnYOorxOKHrnjNMJspS4odNqrmxt2y7TVI2tqbQmcU3aLFPTjOgowNAxD_zXa-Utw==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)

* The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL), the Virginia pro-life affiliate of the National Right to Life Committee has has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far, John McGuire for State Senate District 10. [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN9AupYoeBigkIhAfECt0fr8F-L_neSWW20mv5cpqFZW3X1TOyd3SG6J3YT6gJoNWrQmEur1iyPmDvgf_6qEVtjb2mw54MJtMnvpc85Cbx1EBTaA1CBYziQ13JM41Vhgp9gd2d-BwIRG7MUEOQ5KFgC_62nZG9r9hrq0wrsZflyptUV4UOYqM_61iA_xb9vEHDma0uizPwn_-d-zThdmlEksw==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)

* The Virginia Citizen Defense League (VCDL), Virginia's premier pro-gun organization has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far, John McGuire, because of my "hard hitting pro-gun legislation". [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN9lRsiiSVZM6KaHYq0PhnMyDwF3KZkTH8jkJGxRiGD0GGn7rosPIEDlV2pB1NbeSYUkpcEEGTFQorAK4Nl4l18wSvdVk8mkGz2Pc4VAiPfxjuwNEeho7NzP5_oektE-HU0fo9Zg7lzoXCyuRn8D8C6D3J1T9lg__CpVnR8xk4M378ny24bWPW2yOwoQmmNb2Ye&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)

* Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired) endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN9CQktuTfazwSqWESRnARGf1APxvY4HfGmLEeo_8d-blfgcSWzQHVsc6Nc5SJcs2Ev8zZAD4IsI2BdKnYpCpf-CjRYQRgLk1oCUmA-4hZKT1hFMmu7y-wq-usTrkzBVu--UPJkizh800UcgOXw_vOtIVFchxoDQgH1gKmlPC-o-HarYG2QZk3zT8tqPUdtfzXMsxSs4dHBUglYbcSfFMS5dw==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)

70 Plus Endorsement List [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMIC2pc1v8XjLyQK9Z6Qj-xt_6rLuhnSuruzS6rIwF2M20rY61RArjMmCWbkx7UtpgXzAPo-GumCBvzCk3trdlS08X80EJwXC46mCM_My6yfWUe1mUgUlg-c2xxcyDI5b-Q==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)
---
| 2023 Republican Advance
---
|
---
| At the Republican advance, RPV Chair Rich Anderson, the SCC, and others did a great job telling us what is at stake this year and how we are going to win in 2023. I like what Governor Youngkin said, "we must lock arms and work together just like we did in 2021 so we can win in 2023". Here are three videos from this weekend:
Governor Glenn Youngkin Speech[ click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN90SbbLAjj2O9l6ar9_baq6eSfnZhUQ9T-GCwcjGJZOQMP6fQWjrnLst0lXttBBZ7oPAnj1fSsd3R7qunLYuShYw==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)
Lt.Gov Winsome Sears Speech [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN9cgdpHuR8xERdIm9lrUj-XHBAdk0ceV_nfsgXgClkPpzUgrZ0X0p4FW1axYtofdblVUyNNN-iCsPbw4_ARjMAEA==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)
Senator Tom Cotton Speech [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B7FiMBJB4PO4X7Y6Cv0M6wjVkZnsDmgPCbqd9JF2DImckth_bYjSMHJkvZxQmtN96sOePcI-3iSxMPBTPBRAjge2EGObU3w6ACz08e1mTXChU1awHMzIDlh53fwIKjs8vlc2CFcmtDzk3fqTomZ4Lg==&c=Pu8PxqOSmcblGlzF0GDitFJlbMmvT8PoiTdENb5NO50YXXdUNePjZA==&ch=IzY8yYAmp_L8UhKlNi5YqpQyGQt22tyMJe2fqlMNzuh4XU9HuyBmSg==)
As you can see from the photo, Team McGuire was well represented at the Advance. I missed most of it as I was knocking doors. Further down in this email are more RPV Advance photos from the weekend.
---
| Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler District 59
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Delegate Buddy Fowler is working hard to continue fighting for our conservative values in Richmond. We are putting our signs up now. Let us know if you have a good spot for a big sign or a yard sign at john@mcguireforvirginia.com
---
| Veteran Support
---
|
---
| I am proud to have the support and endorsement of many fellow veterans on our campaign, including U.S. Marine and President/ Founder of STAND America Bishop E.W. Jackson.
---
| Delegate Rob Bell Retirement
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It is hard to believe Delegate Rob Bell will not be a member of the Virginia House of Delegates next year. Delegate Chris Runion and I spoke to the crowd on Rob's significant service to Virginia. Then Rob gave us heartfelt lessons on his service, friends made, and how we can carry the torch. Thank you!
---
| Campaign Photos
---
| My team and I have been knocking doors in ten counties and I have really enjoyed talking with many of you on the phone and at your home. We have much work to do. Let me know if you need a ride to the convention, because May 6 will be here before you know it. I am fighting to protect everyone's right to Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. For a ride, email britton@mcguireforvirginia.com The following are a few photos from the last few weeks in and around the district!

---
|
---

---
| Congratulations to Morton Blackwell on receiving the Lifetime of Service to our Commonwealth award. He was President Ronald Reagan's youngest delegate to the convention and he has been heavily involved in politics ever since. I am proud to have the endorsement of Morton Blackwell.

Senator Amanda Chase

Delegate AC Cordoza & RPV Chair Rich Anderson

| "There You Go Again"
---
|
---
|
---
| "There You Go Again" was a line used by President Reagan when his opponent was using hyperbole and ridiculous accusations. How you campaign is an indicator of how you will govern. My Louisa opponent, Duane Adams, and his consultants continue to use hyperbole to disparage my record. Their latest mailer says I ran for the 10th CD, but they know the truth and are counting on you not doing research. Our treasurer made a clerical error that he quickly corrected and that correction is online. I did not run for the 10th and they know it.
Duane Adams from Louisa County continues to spread lies about my voting record, calling me names, and launching attacks against my solid conservative values. Those comments do not add up as evidenced by my voting record recorded online and our endorsement list. I refuse to take part in mudslinging, but I will hold Mr. Adams accountable for his record.
Duane Adams is not happy we exposed his record of running three times as a Democrat. He actually ran as a Democrat in Hanover County in this district against fellow Republican Frank Hargrove. Mr. Adams also raised taxes forty percent over the last five years. He has raised taxes each year in Louisa County by refusing to lower the tax rate and voting each year for the budget with increased taxes. Folks, this is how supervisors raise taxes. Some on a fixed income have to choose between food or rent. Other counties have lowered their tax rate to give the folks a break.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement == | | Just 13 days to the Convention. | | It is difficult to live, work, and raise your family in peace today due to marxist democrat policies. Everything is more expensive, we are less safe, we now have election season instead of election day, we have divisive woke ideologies in our schools, we are tied to California vehicle emissions standards, and much more. The good news is the Youngkin administration is making progress, but we need a Republican State Senate to make real change. We have been working hard and we are making friends all over Senate District 10. It would be an honor to continue service to you in the Virginia State Senate. Our May 6 Convention is right around the corner. If our convention delegates show up, we will win and then help Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow Republicans un-California Virginia. We are excited to have received the following most recent endorsements: Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. == The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL), the Virginia pro-life affiliate of the National Right to Life Committee has has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far, John McGuire for State Senate District 10. == The Virginia Citizen Defense League (VCDL), Virginia's premier pro-gun organization has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far, John McGuire, because of my "hard hitting pro-gun legislation". == Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired) endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. == 70 Plus Endorsement List == | 2023 Republican Advance | | At the Republican advance, RPV Chair Rich Anderson, the SCC, and others did a great job telling us what is at stake this year and how we are going to win in 2023. I like what Governor Youngkin said, "we must lock arms and work together just like we did in 2021 so we can win in 2023". Here are three videos from this weekend: Governor Glenn Youngkin Speech== Lt.Gov Winsome Sears Speech == Senator Tom Cotton Speech == As you can see from the photo, Team McGuire was well represented at the Advance. I missed most of it as I was knocking doors. Further down in this email are more RPV Advance photos from the weekend. | Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler District 59 | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler is working hard to continue fighting for our conservative values in Richmond. We are putting our signs up now. Let us know if you have a good spot for a big sign or a yard sign at john@mcguireforvirginia.com | Veteran Support | | I am proud to have the support and endorsement of many fellow veterans on our campaign, including U.S. Marine and President/ Founder of STAND America Bishop E.W. Jackson. | Delegate Rob Bell Retirement | | | | It is hard to believe Delegate Rob Bell will not be a member of the Virginia House of Delegates next year. Delegate Chris Runion and I spoke to the crowd on Rob's significant service to Virginia. Then Rob gave us heartfelt lessons on his service, friends made, and how we can carry the torch. Thank you! | Campaign Photos | My team and I have been knocking doors in ten counties and I have really enjoyed talking with many of you on the phone and at your home. We have much work to do. Let me know if you need a ride to the convention, because May 6 will be here before you know it. I am fighting to protect everyone's right to Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. For a ride, email britton@mcguireforvirginia.com The following are a few photos from the last few weeks in and around the district! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We Don't do Woke | | | 2023 RPV Advance Photos | | | Congratulations to Morton Blackwell on receiving the Lifetime of Service to our Commonwealth award. He was President Ronald Reagan's youngest delegate to the convention and he has been heavily involved in politics ever since. I am proud to have the endorsement of Morton Blackwell. | | | Senator Amanda Chase | Delegate AC Cordoza & RPV Chair Rich Anderson | | Lt.Gov Winsome Sears, Senator Amanda Chase, and D 57 Candidate David Owens | | | | | | | | "There You Go Again" | | | "There You Go Again" was a line used by President Reagan when his opponent was using hyperbole and ridiculous accusations. How you campaign is an indicator of how you will govern. My Louisa opponent, Duane Adams, and his consultants continue to use hyperbole to disparage my record. Their latest mailer says I ran for the 10th CD, but they know the truth and are counting on you not doing research. Our treasurer made a clerical error that he quickly corrected and that correction is online. I did not run for the 10th and they know it. Duane Adams from Louisa County continues to spread lies about my voting record, calling me names, and launching attacks against my solid conservative values. Those comments do not add up as evidenced by my voting record recorded online and our endorsement list. I refuse to take part in mudslinging, but I will hold Mr. Adams accountable for his record. Duane Adams is not happy we exposed his record of running three times as a Democrat. He actually ran as a Democrat in Hanover County in this district against fellow Republican Frank Hargrove. Mr. Adams also raised taxes forty percent over the last five years. He has raised taxes each year in Louisa County by refusing to lower the tax rate and voting each year for the budget with increased taxes. Folks, this is how supervisors raise taxes. Some on a fixed income have to choose between food or rent. Other counties have lowered their tax rate to give the folks a break. | Convention Updates go to == | Just 13 days until May 6! All delegates are asked arrive at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. Please send an email to john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you have any questions. | == | You will not have to guess how I will vote as your State Senator. I am one of just nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators in the General Assembly, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, "Conservative Excellence". I have a perfect six-year pro-life voting record, a perfect six-year pro-gun voting record, a 100% Family Foundation score, 100% VCDL score and endorsement, and a 100% NFIB score. Again, you will not have to guess how I will vote. Last year, I was responsible for the largest tax decrease in Virginia history for our veterans, when Governor Youngkin signed my bill, HB 1128. | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. body:
I try not to send too many “hair on fire emails” but I wanted to make sure I was informing you about a major issue in my district that is spreading fast. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62216990/402696609/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWU4MzZiZGMtMjllMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XJzfuQWe1PVNl3DWwfyMwWMaNZlYSYNTv3qt2pwcVR4=) | Peter, I try not to send too many “hair on fire emails” but I wanted to make sure I was informing you about a major issue in my district that is spreading fast. There is a new dangerous street drug called xylazine and its effects are incredibly scary. It’s nicknamed the “zombie drug” because drug dealers are secretly lacing it with fentanyl. This combination is highly addictive and can even cause someone’s flesh to deteriorate at the injection site. It’s also resistant to narcan, meaning we’re seeing a huge spike in deaths. **Xylazine was originally developed as a tranquilizer for 1,000-pound horses, but now it has made its way onto our streets.** I tell you this not to scare you, but to make you aware of how important it is that we take the drug problems in our communities seriously. The opioid epidemic isn’t getting better - it’s getting worse and we need Congress to actually _do something about it._ **That’s why earlier this month, I pushed the Drug Enforcement Agency to focus on this “zombie drug” and cut off its sourcing. Our families’ health and safety depend on it.** I’m happy to report that after my pushing, the Biden Administration has declared xylazine an emerging threat. This is an important designation that will make it easier for law enforcement to immediately deal with the upsurge. However, we still have a ton of work to do to get this under control. Thanks for letting me share what I’ve been working on. I know how important it is that we deal with this epidemic head-on. Stay safe, \- Josh [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62216991/402696610/-1071879344?refcode=E21021-20230423-ZombieDrug-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWU4MzZiZGMtMjllMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XJzfuQWe1PVNl3DWwfyMwWMaNZlYSYNTv3qt2pwcVR4=)
---

clean_body: I try not to send too many “hair on fire emails” but I wanted to make sure I was informing you about a major issue in my district that is spreading fast. | = | Peter, I try not to send too many “hair on fire emails” but I wanted to make sure I was informing you about a major issue in my district that is spreading fast. There is a new dangerous street drug called xylazine and its effects are incredibly scary. It’s nicknamed the “zombie drug” because drug dealers are secretly lacing it with fentanyl. This combination is highly addictive and can even cause someone’s flesh to deteriorate at the injection site. It’s also resistant to narcan, meaning we’re seeing a huge spike in deaths. Xylazine was originally developed as a tranquilizer for 1,000-pound horses, but now it has made its way onto our streets. I tell you this not to scare you, but to make you aware of how important it is that we take the drug problems in our communities seriously. The opioid epidemic isn’t getting better - it’s getting worse and we need Congress to actually do something about it. That’s why earlier this month, I pushed the Drug Enforcement Agency to focus on this “zombie drug” and cut off its sourcing. Our families’ health and safety depend on it. I’m happy to report that after my pushing, the Biden Administration has declared xylazine an emerging threat. This is an important designation that will make it easier for law enforcement to immediately deal with the upsurge. However, we still have a ton of work to do to get this under control. Thanks for letting me share what I’ve been working on. I know how important it is that we deal with this epidemic head-on. Stay safe, \- Josh =

"What will you do with the money if I donate?" I’ve been at the DNC for a while now, and when I get the chance to talk to supporters, this is often one of the first things I’m asked.**It’s a fair question, Derek!** If you’ve had this question on your mind, **I want to give you a look into what the DNC is doing --_right now_ \-- to support Democratic campaigns and win elections.** [If you already know what the DNC is doing and where your money is going, I’d really appreciate it if you’d chip in $7 to support our critical work.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUD71pFwOcoTMmoY7V15aOlxnKmS5Y-7I-2GSOAj9xaJwfqPmxS_uhvVeKdzbZWd7w_VXtnnPgjM8NMLZqxx3iyi1RGRZnVI7d7HybYqneNuL91cRlMYqc8ov7pe8GZ3Juay0mA-DI0iHqURNUhtqhxDv-1g5DAP87c6pz_ThnIJbZ0xZpgLsWWHmSZIZDzqK2UWLHTHWwqd682V3qmAR_yGr06-GsIndDyHWeAnGE0Id16f3O9qvZjm6pgF6i--Mj7RKO515rjbDYx7kjHSuPf18fyer7Hg8PF3dVTW5ru3kk_hdikt4bLJggZ3IwyCe1_3B4pS_34iv0z1ooDPDmukMblcsrafyraItSn0e2UknfATrTEG2_en8FoWTSFazHZqCn23ZJjAr4aFxPXo68j2Iwksk22_YLR2KGh9tCAzQqvkQ8bxcAzia_kVpgBLWe4vRfmr5-wQdItSxz1k0qWWX9ZneEDZSYEx45gS02ekNQX0QyLxQ6f-0Ea86DFsNxkM-nSfO5rI7ZqN1g7MYOBUEb8UQfjUQAi_iXvsykurgbmodkaEBS30Z_8Le0pelxvvQ8H4ANS5iMDU04thpKg/3vl/gDreLoGhQNmGMgUJYSsm_w/h0/J8hOdhOnPef1Tzdx5uCEDXO8Vh4mVPVVwG7DxilAPXo) If you want more information, that’s what I’m here for. Keep reading:

* * *
**Every State Party; Every Race; Every Year:** The DNC is the only party committee responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate. We do that by sending resources to state parties, who then can use what we send them to invest in local elections like school board and state legislative seats. They can also make long-term investments in vital programs like voter protection services or hire more staff. **Here’s a recent example:** We sent the Wisconsin Democratic Party resources to help win this month’s contentious Supreme Court election and seats up and down the ballot. Justice-Elect Janet Protasiewicz won by a whopping _11-points._ For context, President Biden only won Wisconsin by _one_ point in 2020. (We also sent voter education messages and recruited volunteers for Get Out The Vote efforts.) **Infrastructure Is Not Just a Buzzword:** We mention “electoral infrastructure” a lot in these kinds of emails, but let’s dive into exactly what that means. Infrastructure is everything from dollars and staff, to data and tech tools, access to our continuously updated and ever-growing voter file, voter protection, and so much more. Everything and anything that goes into making a campaign run is infrastructure. **Thanks to the DNC’s infrastructure (and folks like you who helped us build it), campaigns can easily prepare for that transition and get straight to work.** If campaigns had to do all of this on their own, their work to win votes would be delayed, and time is a precious resource for campaigns. **The DNC wants to make sure that candidates are doing what they do best -- talking to voters and getting their message out there.**
* * *
I know that was a lot of writing, Derek. But I’m giving you all this information because we need dedicated supporters like you to know that your hard earned money is really making a difference. [If you’re able to, chip in $7 to support all of the things I just mentioned and more. The DNC works to win races up and down the ballot _every year_ \-- we can do that thanks to the support of grassroots donors pitching in what they can. ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUD71pFwOcoTMmoY7V15aOlxnKmS5Y-7I-2GSOAj9xaJwfqPmxS_uhvVeKdzbZWd7w_VXtnnPgjM8NMLZqxx3iyi1RGRZnVI7d7HybYqneNsaYdaCKcYjbHwJi4bgyej-nhq0v9PYaHYTZmRNgpsiJXEY_95SKgy3aXD-AiX7Kg-0oqw-VT5CO1KIsqTiwgsUcgroXZHS9TSij7JhH9JVJOeIQ8GI1c4Whb7ujNT7pQJupZgw1ei0X5VbMuTtyof9bbEnK1aL1Nge1pSgGSvJY3PTtWfTWonmfb3m-QFROq_hJYoIOy7o41UjE4F88URfCQ9Pt08E2CkDuno2FpguGKZQOK8FrG65LCFFzpiMXxljR5_vmJ8ddusEgnMDpftGcfV30IqQg31mEMxV9LjPkoMmhZ-XxdC-6YC71hlWBFZAMtMPfxx55ilSgrqX4kQh2FcvTfmqxtpKsLhEUuYVDOmeDQDqu7TUP69n6HPswZ26RDuLHsztxV4XWs0l7BiXdI1E9-lxVKiDUvUAMh1V04zlhCDIFBiTvaA005MsWxh-cBkSJVJL9t-u7Yzs8mo_BhX1RUUv0VekHbavKq7qcA/3vl/gDreLoGhQNmGMgUJYSsm_w/h1/68QKHCh9JOkqvZV6Gabf1ojoLb7L7XkRrvQBdcN4-Vk)

clean_body: | | "What will you do with the money if I donate?" I’ve been at the DNC for a while now, and when I get the chance to talk to supporters, this is often one of the first things I’m asked.It’s a fair question, Derek! If you’ve had this question on your mind, I want to give you a look into what the DNC is doing --right now \-- to support Democratic campaigns and win elections. If you want more information, that’s what I’m here for. Keep reading: Every State Party; Every Race; Every Year: The DNC is the only party committee responsible for electing Democrats from the school board to the Senate. We do that by sending resources to state parties, who then can use what we send them to invest in local elections like school board and state legislative seats. They can also make long-term investments in vital programs like voter protection services or hire more staff. Here’s a recent example: We sent the Wisconsin Democratic Party resources to help win this month’s contentious Supreme Court election and seats up and down the ballot. Justice-Elect Janet Protasiewicz won by a whopping 11-points. For context, President Biden only won Wisconsin by one point in 2020. (We also sent voter education messages and recruited volunteers for Get Out The Vote efforts.) Infrastructure Is Not Just a Buzzword: We mention “electoral infrastructure” a lot in these kinds of emails, but let’s dive into exactly what that means. Infrastructure is everything from dollars and staff, to data and tech tools, access to our continuously updated and ever-growing voter file, voter protection, and so much more. Everything and anything that goes into making a campaign run is infrastructure. Thanks to the DNC’s infrastructure (and folks like you who helped us build it), campaigns can easily prepare for that transition and get straight to work. If campaigns had to do all of this on their own, their work to win votes would be delayed, and time is a precious resource for campaigns. The DNC wants to make sure that candidates are doing what they do best -- talking to voters and getting their message out there. I know that was a lot of writing, Derek. But I’m giving you all this information because we need dedicated supporters like you to know that your hard earned money is really making a difference. Hope this helps, Patrick Patrick Stevenson Chief Mobilization Officer Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . clean_body: These folks are tireless, fearless, and ready to change our city — AND they look great in hot pink! | = Hey folks — It’s Salima, Helen’s Mobilization Director. Can you believe that, after today, there are only three weekends left in this race? It’ll be an all-out sprint to the finish, and as you read this email, volunteers are knocking on thousands of doors and speaking to voters all over our beautiful city. Take a look: = Just like Helen, these folks are tireless, fearless, and ready to change our city for the better — AND they look great in hot pink! = | = The energy of the grassroots movement we’ve built is electric, and it wouldn’t be possible without two key ingredients: 1) The time and resources we’ve invested in 1:1 voter outreach, thanks to your grassroots contributions: From clipboards and campaign literature, to snacks and tables, to the technology that makes it all run, reaching voters face-to-face is hard and costly work. We could not afford to have the impact we do without support from grassroots supporters like you. 2) A desire for transformative change & a willingness to fight for it: Helen isn’t running for Mayor to nibble at the edges of our problems. She’s running to roll up her sleeves and deliver the systemic change we need. Our supporters share that drive, and the voters we talk to respond to it. In a field this historically large, a handful of votes may decide Philadelphia’s next Mayor, and the work our volunteers are doing today (and every day) is indispensable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do to support Helen and our movement. We’ll finish this campaign strong because of you. Thank you! Salima Pace Mobilization Director Helen Gym for Mayor P.S. If you want the shirt that’s being seen all over Philly, Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: | = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
